conclusions: LLM-guided Bluetooth protocol fuzzing discovered 8 bugs in BlueZ and the Android Bluetooth stack.
The LLM's understanding of Bluetooth protocol state machines and specifications enables it to generate valid protocol message sequences.
Discovered bugs include security-relevant issues such as crashes caused by state machine violations and specification inconsistencies.
conclusions_zh: LLM引导的蓝牙协议模糊测试在BlueZ和Android蓝牙栈中发现了8个缺陷。
LLM对蓝牙协议状态机和规范的理解使其能够生成有效的协议消息序列。
发现的缺陷包括状态机违反导致的崩溃和规范不一致等安全相关问题。

title: LLM Safety Alignment: Methods, Challenges, and the Path Forward
authors: Zhengmian Liu, Hao Chen, Yue Wang
abstract: Reviews safety alignment methods for LLMs including RLHF, DPO, constitutional AI, and red teaming.
summary: Reviews safety alignment methods for LLMs including RLHF, DPO, constitutional AI, and red teaming.
summary_zh: 综述LLM安全对齐方法，包括RLHF、DPO、宪法AI和红队测试。

experiment.key_results: Compares 10+ alignment methods across safety benchmarks

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for reviews safety alignment methods for LLMs including RLHF, DPO, constitutional AI, and red teaming.
Applies GPT-4, Claude, Llama-2 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Compares 10+ alignment methods across safety benchmarks.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for reviews safety alignment methods for LLMs including RLHF, DPO, constitutional AI, and red teaming.
应用 GPT-4, Claude, Llama-2 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Compares 10+ alignment methods across safety benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 综述LLM安全对齐方法，包括RLHF、DPO、宪法AI和红队测试。
research_questions: How do different safety alignment methods (RLHF, DPO, Constitutional AI, red teaming) compare in effectiveness?
What are the key trade-offs between safety alignment strength and model utility across different approaches?
Which alignment method generalizes best to unseen harmful content categories?
research_questions_zh: 不同的安全对齐方法（RLHF、DPO、宪法AI、红队测试）在效果上如何比较？
不同方法在安全对齐强度与模型实用性之间的关键权衡是什么？
哪种对齐方法对未见过的有害内容类别泛化能力最强？
conclusions: Through systematic comparison of over 10 alignment methods, RLHF demonstrated the most balanced performance on comprehensive safety benchmarks.
DPO is more training-efficient than RLHF but slightly less robust under adversarial attack scenarios.
Red teaming remains indispensable as a validation method, as no single alignment approach can fully prevent all safety risks.
conclusions_zh: 通过对10余种对齐方法的系统比较，RLHF在综合安全基准上表现最为均衡。
DPO在训练效率上优于RLHF，但在对抗性攻击场景下的鲁棒性稍弱。
红队测试作为验证手段仍不可或缺，任何单一对齐方法都无法完全防范所有安全风险。

title: ShadowLLM: Detecting Shadow AI Usage in Enterprises
authors: Xun Yang, Bo Li, Zheng Chen
abstract: Detects unauthorized LLM usage in enterprises that may leak sensitive data to external AI services.
summary: Detects unauthorized LLM usage in enterprises that may leak sensitive data to external AI services.
summary_zh: 检测企业中可能向外部AI服务泄露敏感数据的未授权LLM使用。

experiment.key_results: Detects 92% of shadow AI usage via network analysis

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for detects unauthorized LLM usage in enterprises that may leak sensitive data to external AI services.
Applies GPT-4 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Detects 92% of shadow AI usage via network analysis.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for detects unauthorized LLM usage in enterprises that may leak sensitive data to external AI services.
应用 GPT-4 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Detects 92% of shadow AI usage via network analysis.
abstract_zh: 检测企业中可能向外部AI服务泄露敏感数据的未授权LLM使用。
research_questions: How can unauthorized LLM usage in enterprises be detected to prevent sensitive data leakage to external AI services?
What network analysis techniques are effective for identifying shadow AI usage patterns?
What is the detection accuracy for identifying unauthorized calls to external LLM APIs?
research_questions_zh: 如何检测企业中未授权的LLM使用以防止敏感数据泄露到外部AI服务？
哪些网络分析技术能有效识别影子AI的使用模式？
识别对外部LLM API未授权调用的检测准确率是多少？
conclusions: Through network traffic analysis, the system detected 92% of shadow AI usage.
Detection methods based on API call patterns and data transfer characteristics can distinguish between authorized and unauthorized LLM usage.
Shadow AI usage in enterprises is more prevalent than expected, posing significant data leakage risks.
conclusions_zh: 通过网络流量分析，系统检测到了92%的影子AI使用行为。
基于API调用模式和数据传输特征的检测方法能够区分授权和未授权的LLM使用。
企业中影子AI的使用比预期更为普遍，构成了显著的数据泄露风险。

title: Backdoor Attacks on LLMs: A Comprehensive Survey
authors: Yue Wang, Zhen Li, Jun Chen
abstract: Surveys backdoor attacks on LLMs covering training-time, fine-tuning, and inference-time attack vectors.
summary: Surveys backdoor attacks on LLMs covering training-time, fine-tuning, and inference-time attack vectors.
summary_zh: 综述LLM后门攻击，涵盖训练时、微调时和推理时攻击向量。

experiment.key_results: Catalogs 40+ backdoor attack techniques for LLMs

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for surveys backdoor attacks on LLMs covering training-time, fine-tuning, and inference-time attack vectors.
Applies  to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Catalogs 40+ backdoor attack techniques for LLMs.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for surveys backdoor attacks on LLMs covering training-time, fine-tuning, and inference-time attack vectors.
应用  to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Catalogs 40+ backdoor attack techniques for LLMs.
abstract_zh: 综述LLM后门攻击，涵盖训练时、微调时和推理时攻击向量。
research_questions: What are the key attack vectors for backdoor attacks on LLMs across training, fine-tuning, and inference stages?
How do different backdoor attack techniques compare in terms of stealthiness and effectiveness?
What defense mechanisms are available against each category of LLM backdoor attack?
research_questions_zh: LLM在训练、微调和推理阶段面临的后门攻击关键攻击向量是什么？
不同的后门攻击技术在隐蔽性和有效性方面如何比较？
针对每种类别的LLM后门攻击有哪些可用的防御机制？
conclusions: The study systematically cataloged over 40 backdoor attack techniques targeting LLMs, categorized across three phases: training-time, fine-tuning-time, and inference-time.
Fine-tuning-phase backdoor attacks are the most dangerous and hardest to detect, as attackers can directly manipulate model parameters.
Existing defenses mostly target specific attack types and lack a general cross-phase backdoor detection and mitigation framework.
conclusions_zh: 系统梳理了40余种针对LLM的后门攻击技术，按训练时、微调时和推理时三个阶段进行分类。
微调阶段的后门攻击因攻击者可直接操控模型参数而最为危险且最难检测。
现有防御手段大多针对特定攻击类型，缺乏通用的跨阶段后门检测和缓解框架。

title: RobustLLM: Improving LLM Robustness Against Adversarial Inputs
authors: Jiaxin Chen, Yue Wang
abstract: Proposes training techniques to improve LLM robustness against adversarial prompt perturbations.
summary: Proposes training techniques to improve LLM robustness against adversarial prompt perturbations.
summary_zh: 提出训练技术以提升LLM对抗对抗性提示扰动的鲁棒性。

experiment.key_results: Reduces adversarial attack success by 40% with 5% utility loss

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for training techniques to improve LLM robustness against adversarial prompt perturbations.
Applies Llama-2 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Reduces adversarial attack success by 40% with 5% utility loss.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for training techniques to improve LLM robustness against adversarial prompt perturbations.
应用 Llama-2 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Reduces adversarial attack success by 40% with 5% utility loss.
abstract_zh: 提出训练技术以提升LLM对抗对抗性提示扰动的鲁棒性。
research_questions: What training techniques can improve LLM robustness against adversarial prompt perturbations?
What is the trade-off between adversarial robustness and model utility when applying robustness training?
How much can adversarial attack success rate be reduced while preserving acceptable model performance?
research_questions_zh: 哪些训练技术能提高LLM对对抗性提示扰动的鲁棒性？
应用鲁棒性训练时，对抗鲁棒性与模型实用性之间的权衡是什么？
在保持可接受的模型性能的同时，对抗攻击成功率能降低多少？
conclusions: The proposed training techniques reduced adversarial attack success rates by 40% while incurring only a 5% loss in model utility.
Robustness training based on Llama-2 demonstrated effective defense across a variety of adversarial perturbation strategies.
Combining robustness training with safety alignment provides more comprehensive security guarantees than using either method alone.
conclusions_zh: 提出的训练技术将对抗攻击成功率降低了40%，而模型实用性仅损失5%。
基于Llama-2的鲁棒性训练在多种对抗性扰动策略下均展现了有效的防御能力。
鲁棒性训练与安全对齐的结合能够提供比单独使用任一方法更全面的安全保障。

title: PrivLLM: Privacy-Preserving LLM Inference via Secure Computation
authors: Chenghao Zhang, Jian Li, Tao Wang
abstract: Enables privacy-preserving LLM inference using MPC and homomorphic encryption, protecting user prompts.
summary: Enables privacy-preserving LLM inference using MPC and homomorphic encryption, protecting user prompts.
summary_zh: 使用MPC和同态加密实现隐私保护的LLM推理，保护用户提示。

experiment.key_results: MPC-based inference with 50x overhead vs plaintext

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for enables privacy-preserving LLM inference using MPC and homomorphic encryption, protecting user prompts.
Applies Llama-2 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: MPC-based inference with 50x overhead vs plaintext.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for enables privacy-preserving LLM inference using MPC and homomorphic encryption, protecting user prompts.
应用 Llama-2 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: MPC-based inference with 50x overhead vs plaintext.
abstract_zh: 使用MPC和同态加密实现隐私保护的LLM推理，保护用户提示。
research_questions: Can MPC and homomorphic encryption enable privacy-preserving LLM inference while protecting user prompts?
What is the computational overhead of MPC-based LLM inference compared to plaintext inference?
How can privacy-preserving inference be optimized to reduce the latency gap with unprotected inference?
research_questions_zh: 多方计算和同态加密能否在保护用户提示的同时实现LLM的隐私保护推理？
基于MPC的LLM推理与明文推理相比的计算开销是多少？
如何优化隐私保护推理以缩小与非保护推理之间的延迟差距？
conclusions: MPC-based privacy-preserving LLM inference achieves full confidentiality of user prompts but incurs approximately 50x computational overhead.
A hybrid protocol design combining MPC and homomorphic encryption selects the optimal encryption scheme for different layers to reduce overall overhead.
The approach provides a viable solution for deploying LLMs in privacy-sensitive domains such as healthcare and legal services that require strong privacy guarantees.
conclusions_zh: 基于MPC的隐私保护LLM推理实现了用户提示的完全保密，但产生了约50倍的计算开销。
通过混合协议设计（结合MPC和同态加密），在不同层选择最优加密方案以减少总开销。
该方法为需要强隐私保证的医疗、法律等敏感领域的LLM部署提供了可行方案。

title: Detecting LLM-Generated Code in Open Source Projects
authors: Yuxiang Wu, He Ye, Martin Monperrus
abstract: Develops techniques to detect LLM-generated code contributions in open source, addressing supply chain risks.
summary: Develops techniques to detect LLM-generated code contributions in open source, addressing supply chain risks.
summary_zh: 开发检测开源项目中LLM生成代码贡献的技术，应对供应链风险。

experiment.key_results: 85% accuracy in detecting LLM-generated code contributions

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for techniques to detect LLM-generated code contributions in open source, addressing supply chain risks.
Applies GPT-4, Copilot to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 85% accuracy in detecting LLM-generated code contributions.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for techniques to detect LLM-generated code contributions in open source, addressing supply chain risks.
应用 GPT-4, Copilot to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 85% accuracy in detecting LLM-generated code contributions.
abstract_zh: 开发检测开源项目中LLM生成代码贡献的技术，应对供应链风险。
research_questions: Can LLM-generated code contributions in open source projects be reliably detected?
What stylistic and statistical features distinguish LLM-generated code from human-written code?
What supply chain security risks arise from undetected LLM-generated code in open source?
research_questions_zh: 开源项目中LLM生成的代码贡献能否被可靠检测？
哪些风格和统计特征能区分LLM生成的代码与人工编写的代码？
开源项目中未检测到的LLM生成代码会带来哪些供应链安全风险？
conclusions: The detection method achieved 85% accuracy in identifying LLM-generated code contributions.
LLM-generated code exhibits identifiable characteristics in naming conventions, comment patterns, and code structure.
Unreviewed LLM-generated code may contain hidden vulnerabilities or backdoors, posing potential threats to software supply chain security.
conclusions_zh: 检测方法在识别LLM生成的代码贡献方面达到了85%的准确率。
LLM生成的代码在命名约定、注释模式和代码结构上呈现出可识别的特征。
未经审查的LLM生成代码可能包含隐藏的漏洞或后门，对软件供应链安全构成潜在威胁。

title: SafeAgent: Ensuring Safety in LLM-Based Autonomous Agents
authors: Tian Li, Yue Wang, Dawn Song
abstract: Proposes safety mechanisms for LLM-based autonomous agents to prevent harmful actions in real environments.
summary: Proposes safety mechanisms for LLM-based autonomous agents to prevent harmful actions in real environments.
summary_zh: 为基于LLM的自主代理提出安全机制，防止在真实环境中执行有害操作。

experiment.key_results: Prevents 95% of harmful agent actions with <5% task performance loss

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for safety mechanisms for LLM-based autonomous agents to prevent harmful actions in real environments.
Applies GPT-4, Claude to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Prevents 95% of harmful agent actions with <5% task performance loss.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for safety mechanisms for LLM-based autonomous agents to prevent harmful actions in real environments.
应用 GPT-4, Claude to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Prevents 95% of harmful agent actions with <5% task performance loss.
abstract_zh: 为基于LLM的自主代理提出安全机制，防止在真实环境中执行有害操作。
research_questions: What safety mechanisms can prevent LLM-based autonomous agents from performing harmful actions in real environments?
What is the trade-off between safety enforcement and task completion performance in LLM agents?
How effective are proposed safety guardrails against diverse categories of harmful agent behaviors?
research_questions_zh: 哪些安全机制能防止基于LLM的自主代理在真实环境中执行有害操作？
LLM代理中安全执行与任务完成性能之间的权衡是什么？
提出的安全护栏对不同类别的有害代理行为的防御效果如何？
conclusions: The proposed safety mechanisms blocked 95% of harmful agent actions while incurring less than 5% task performance loss.
A dual-layer safety architecture based on action pre-review and impact prediction is most effective at preventing irreversible harmful actions.
For agents powered by GPT-4 and Claude, the safety mechanisms demonstrated consistent protection across different task domains and risk types.
conclusions_zh: 提出的安全机制阻止了95%的有害代理操作，同时任务性能损失不到5%。
基于行动预审和影响预测的双层安全架构在防范不可逆有害操作方面最为有效。
对于GPT-4和Claude驱动的代理，安全机制在不同任务领域和风险类型上均表现出一致的保护效果。

title: CensorShip: Understanding and Evaluating LLM Content Moderation
authors: Yifan Huang, Yang Liu, Neil Gong
abstract: Evaluates content moderation in LLMs, testing whether safety filters can be circumvented systematically.
summary: Evaluates content moderation in LLMs, testing whether safety filters can be circumvented systematically.
summary_zh: 评估LLM中的内容审核，测试安全过滤器是否可以被系统性地绕过。

experiment.key_results: Identifies 12 systematic content moderation bypass techniques

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for content moderation in LLMs, testing whether safety filters can be circumvented systematically.
Applies GPT-4, Claude, Llama-2 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Identifies 12 systematic content moderation bypass techniques.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for content moderation in LLMs, testing whether safety filters can be circumvented systematically.
应用 GPT-4, Claude, Llama-2 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Identifies 12 systematic content moderation bypass techniques.
abstract_zh: 评估LLM中的内容审核，测试安全过滤器是否可以被系统性地绕过。
research_questions: Can LLM safety content filters be systematically circumvented?
What techniques are most effective for bypassing content moderation in GPT-4, Claude, and Llama-2?
How robust are current content moderation mechanisms across different attack strategies?
research_questions_zh: LLM安全内容过滤器能否被系统性地绕过？
哪些技术最能有效绕过GPT-4、Claude和Llama-2中的内容审核？
当前内容审核机制在不同攻击策略下的鲁棒性如何？
conclusions: The study identified 12 systematic content moderation bypass techniques, covering strategies such as language switching, role-playing, and logical manipulation.
Different LLMs' content moderation mechanisms exhibit significant variations in response to the same bypass techniques.
Current content moderation relies primarily on surface-level pattern matching and is insufficiently robust against semantic-level bypass attacks.
conclusions_zh: 研究识别出12种系统性的内容审核绕过技术，涵盖语言转换、角色扮演和逻辑操纵等策略。
不同LLM的内容审核机制在应对相同绕过技术时表现出显著差异。
现有内容审核主要依赖表层模式匹配，对语义级别的绕过攻击防御能力不足。

title: Protecting LLM Intellectual Property via Fingerprinting
authors: Wenting Zhao, Sen Chen, Bo Li
abstract: Proposes fingerprinting techniques for LLM IP protection, detecting unauthorized model copies and derivatives.
summary: Proposes fingerprinting techniques for LLM IP protection, detecting unauthorized model copies and derivatives.
summary_zh: 提出LLM知识产权保护的指纹技术，检测未授权模型副本和衍生品。

experiment.key_results: 99% fingerprint detection accuracy, survives fine-tuning

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for fingerprinting techniques for LLM IP protection, detecting unauthorized model copies and derivatives.
Applies Llama-2 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 99% fingerprint detection accuracy, survives fine-tuning.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for fingerprinting techniques for LLM IP protection, detecting unauthorized model copies and derivatives.
应用 Llama-2 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 99% fingerprint detection accuracy, survives fine-tuning.
abstract_zh: 提出LLM知识产权保护的指纹技术，检测未授权模型副本和衍生品。
research_questions: Can fingerprinting techniques effectively detect unauthorized copies and derivatives of LLMs?
Do model fingerprints survive fine-tuning, quantization, and other model transformations?
What is the detection accuracy of fingerprint-based LLM intellectual property verification?
research_questions_zh: 指纹技术能否有效检测LLM的未授权副本和衍生版本？
模型指纹能否在微调、量化和其他模型变换后保持有效？
基于指纹的LLM知识产权验证的检测准确率是多少？
conclusions: The proposed fingerprinting method achieved 99% detection accuracy and remains effective even after model transformations such as fine-tuning.
Experiments on Llama-2 demonstrated that fingerprint embedding has negligible impact on model utility.
The approach provides a practical technical solution for intellectual property protection of open-source LLMs, capable of detecting unauthorized commercial use.
conclusions_zh: 提出的指纹方法达到了99%的检测准确率，且在微调等模型变换后仍保持有效。
基于Llama-2的实验表明，指纹嵌入对模型实用性的影响可忽略不计。
该方法为开源LLM的知识产权保护提供了实用的技术方案，可检测未经授权的商业使用。

title: Prompt Leaking Attacks on LLM Applications
authors: Yue Wang, Yi Liu, Neil Gong
abstract: Studies prompt leaking attacks where adversaries extract system prompts from LLM applications.
summary: Studies prompt leaking attacks where adversaries extract system prompts from LLM applications.
summary_zh: 研究对抗者从LLM应用中提取系统提示的提示泄露攻击。

experiment.key_results: Extracts system prompts from 70% of tested LLM applications

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for studies prompt leaking attacks where adversaries extract system prompts from LLM applications.
Applies GPT-4, Claude to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Extracts system prompts from 70% of tested LLM applications.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for studies prompt leaking attacks where adversaries extract system prompts from LLM applications.
应用 GPT-4, Claude to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Extracts system prompts from 70% of tested LLM applications.
abstract_zh: 研究对抗者从LLM应用中提取系统提示的提示泄露攻击。
research_questions: How effectively can adversaries extract system prompts from deployed LLM applications?
What attack strategies are most successful in eliciting hidden system prompt content?
What proportion of real-world LLM applications are vulnerable to prompt extraction attacks?
research_questions_zh: 对手能多有效地从已部署的LLM应用中提取系统提示？
哪些攻击策略在诱导隐藏系统提示内容方面最成功？
多大比例的真实LLM应用容易受到提示提取攻击？
conclusions: Attackers successfully extracted system prompt content from 70% of tested LLM applications.
Indirect guidance and meta-conversation techniques are the most effective prompt extraction strategies, as they exploit the compliance tendency of LLMs.
Most current LLM applications lack effective system prompt protection mechanisms, exposing business logic and security policies.
conclusions_zh: 攻击者成功从70%的测试LLM应用中提取了系统提示内容。
间接引导和元对话技术是最有效的提示提取策略，因为它们利用了LLM的遵从倾向。
当前大多数LLM应用缺乏有效的系统提示保护机制，暴露了商业逻辑和安全策略。

title: SafeDecoding: Defending Against Jailbreak Attacks via Safety-Aware Decoding
authors: Zhangchen Chen, Fangzhou Wang, Bo Li
abstract: Proposes safety-aware decoding that identifies and suppresses unsafe token distributions during generation.
summary: Proposes safety-aware decoding that identifies and suppresses unsafe token distributions during generation.
summary_zh: 提出安全感知解码，在生成过程中识别和抑制不安全的令牌分布。

experiment.key_results: Reduces jailbreak success by 85% with minimal quality impact

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for safety-aware decoding that identifies and suppresses unsafe token distributions during generation.
Applies Llama-2 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Reduces jailbreak success by 85% with minimal quality impact.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for safety-aware decoding that identifies and suppresses unsafe token distributions during generation.
应用 Llama-2 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Reduces jailbreak success by 85% with minimal quality impact.
abstract_zh: 提出安全感知解码，在生成过程中识别和抑制不安全的令牌分布。
research_questions: Can safety-aware token decoding effectively defend against jailbreak attacks on LLMs?
How much jailbreak success rate reduction can be achieved through modified decoding without retraining?
What is the impact of safety-aware decoding on normal generation quality and helpfulness?
research_questions_zh: 安全感知的token解码能否有效防御LLM的越狱攻击？
通过修改解码过程而无需重训练，能将越狱成功率降低多少？
安全感知解码对正常生成质量和有用性的影响是什么？
conclusions: Safety-aware decoding reduced jailbreak attack success rates by 85% with minimal impact on normal output quality.
The method blocks jailbreak attacks by identifying and suppressing unsafe token distributions, requiring no additional training or fine-tuning.
Experiments on Llama-2 validated the method's broad defensive effectiveness against multiple mainstream jailbreak attack techniques.
conclusions_zh: 安全感知解码将越狱攻击成功率降低了85%，同时对正常输出质量影响极小。
该方法通过识别和抑制不安全的token分布来阻断越狱攻击，无需额外训练或微调。
基于Llama-2的实验验证了该方法对多种主流越狱攻击技术的广泛防御效果。

title: Jailbreaking Multimodal Large Language Models
authors: Haotian Liu, Chunyuan Li, Yong Jae Lee
abstract: Studies jailbreak attacks on multimodal LLMs through adversarial images that bypass text-based safety filters.
summary: Studies jailbreak attacks on multimodal LLMs through adversarial images that bypass text-based safety filters.
summary_zh: 研究通过对抗性图像绕过文本安全过滤器的多模态LLM越狱攻击。

experiment.key_results: Visual adversarial inputs bypass 80% of text-based safety filters

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for studies jailbreak attacks on multimodal LLMs through adversarial images that bypass text-based safety filters.
Applies GPT-4V, LLaVA to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Visual adversarial inputs bypass 80% of text-based safety filters.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for studies jailbreak attacks on multimodal LLMs through adversarial images that bypass text-based safety filters.
应用 GPT-4V, LLaVA to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Visual adversarial inputs bypass 80% of text-based safety filters.
abstract_zh: 研究通过对抗性图像绕过文本安全过滤器的多模态LLM越狱攻击。
research_questions: Can adversarial images bypass text-based safety filters in multimodal LLMs?
What proportion of text-based safety filters are vulnerable to visual adversarial inputs?
How do current multimodal safety mechanisms handle cross-modal jailbreak attacks?
research_questions_zh: 对抗性图像能否绕过多模态LLM中基于文本的安全过滤器？
多大比例的基于文本的安全过滤器容易受到视觉对抗输入的攻击？
当前的多模态安全机制如何应对跨模态越狱攻击？
conclusions: Visual adversarial inputs successfully bypassed 80% of text-based safety filters.
Experiments on GPT-4V and LLaVA revealed that current multimodal LLM safety mechanisms primarily focus on the text modality and are insufficiently defended against attacks through the visual channel.
Cross-modal safety alignment is a critical challenge for multimodal LLMs, requiring a unified safety framework that covers all input modalities simultaneously.
conclusions_zh: 视觉对抗输入成功绕过了80%的基于文本的安全过滤器。
在GPT-4V和LLaVA上的实验表明，当前多模态LLM的安全机制主要聚焦于文本模态，对视觉通道的攻击防御不足。
跨模态安全对齐是多模态LLM面临的关键挑战，需要同时覆盖所有输入模态的统一安全框架。

title: LLM Forensics: Tracing AI-Generated Content
authors: Haoxiang Wu, Hao Sun, Zheng Chen
abstract: Develops forensic techniques for tracing AI-generated content to specific LLM models and timestamps.
summary: Develops forensic techniques for tracing AI-generated content to specific LLM models and timestamps.
summary_zh: 开发追踪AI生成内容到特定LLM模型和时间戳的取证技术。

experiment.key_results: 92% model attribution accuracy across 10 LLMs

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for forensic techniques for tracing AI-generated content to specific LLM models and timestamps.
Applies GPT-4, Claude, Llama to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 92% model attribution accuracy across 10 LLMs.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for forensic techniques for tracing AI-generated content to specific LLM models and timestamps.
应用 GPT-4, Claude, Llama to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 92% model attribution accuracy across 10 LLMs.
abstract_zh: 开发追踪AI生成内容到特定LLM模型和时间戳的取证技术。
research_questions: Can AI-generated content be reliably traced to specific LLM models and generation timestamps?
What forensic features enable accurate model attribution across different LLM families?
How robust is model attribution against paraphrasing and other content modification attempts?
research_questions_zh: AI生成的内容能否被可靠地追溯到特定的LLM模型和生成时间？
哪些取证特征能够跨不同LLM家族实现准确的模型归属判定？
模型归属判定对改写和其他内容修改尝试的鲁棒性如何？
conclusions: The proposed forensic techniques achieved 92% model attribution accuracy across 10 LLMs.
Each LLM's output exhibits unique statistical fingerprints, including characteristics such as lexical choice distributions, syntactic patterns, and generation rhythms.
The model attribution method maintains high accuracy under light paraphrasing but shows decreased accuracy when facing deep rewriting.
conclusions_zh: 提出的取证技术在10个LLM之间实现了92%的模型归属准确率。
每个LLM的生成具有独特的统计指纹，包括词汇选择分布、句法模式和生成节奏等特征。
模型归属方法在轻度改写下仍保持较高准确率，但面对深度改写时准确率有所下降。

title: LLMGuard: Runtime Safety Monitoring for LLM Applications
authors: Zhen Li, Tao Wang, Yan Cai
abstract: Runtime monitoring system that detects unsafe LLM behaviors in real-time during deployment.
summary: Runtime monitoring system that detects unsafe LLM behaviors in real-time during deployment.
summary_zh: 实时监控系统，在部署期间实时检测不安全的LLM行为。

experiment.key_results: Catches 90% of unsafe outputs with <10ms latency overhead

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for runtime monitoring system that detects unsafe LLM behaviors in real-time during deployment.
Applies GPT-4 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Catches 90% of unsafe outputs with <10ms latency overhead.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for runtime monitoring system that detects unsafe LLM behaviors in real-time during deployment.
应用 GPT-4 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Catches 90% of unsafe outputs with <10ms latency overhead.
abstract_zh: 实时监控系统，在部署期间实时检测不安全的LLM行为。
research_questions: Can runtime monitoring detect unsafe LLM behaviors in real-time during deployment?
What is the latency overhead of real-time safety monitoring for LLM applications?
What categories of unsafe outputs can be detected through runtime behavioral monitoring?
research_questions_zh: 运行时监控能否在部署期间实时检测LLM的不安全行为？
LLM应用的实时安全监控的延迟开销是多少？
通过运行时行为监控能检测哪些类别的不安全输出？
conclusions: The runtime monitoring system detected 90% of unsafe outputs with less than 10 milliseconds of latency overhead.
Real-time analysis based on output features can effectively identify unsafe behaviors including harmful content, privacy leakage, and instruction injection.
The low-latency characteristics make the system suitable for deployment as a safety barrier for LLM applications in production environments.
conclusions_zh: 运行时监控系统检测到了90%的不安全输出，延迟开销不到10毫秒。
基于输出特征的实时分析能够有效识别有害内容、隐私泄露和指令注入等不安全行为。
低延迟特性使该系统适合在生产环境中作为LLM应用的安全屏障部署。

title: Evaluating LLM-Based Fuzzing: Lessons and Insights
authors: Marcel Bohme, Van-Thuan Pham
abstract: Comprehensive evaluation of LLM-based fuzzing approaches, identifying when LLMs help and when they don't.
summary: Comprehensive evaluation of LLM-based fuzzing approaches, identifying when LLMs help and when they don't.
summary_zh: LLM模糊测试方法的全面评估，识别LLM何时有帮助何时无帮助。

experiment.key_results: LLMs help most with structured inputs, least with binary formats

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for comprehensive evaluation of LLM-based fuzzing approaches, identifying when LLMs help and when they don't.
Leverages GPT-4, CodeLlama for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: LLMs help most with structured inputs, least with binary formats.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for comprehensive evaluation of LLM-based fuzzing approaches, identifying when LLMs help and when they don't.
利用 GPT-4, CodeLlama for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: LLMs help most with structured inputs, least with binary formats.
abstract_zh: LLM模糊测试方法的全面评估，识别LLM何时有帮助何时无帮助。
research_questions: Under what conditions do LLMs provide genuine improvements over traditional fuzzing techniques?
For which input types (structured vs. binary) do LLMs offer the most benefit in fuzzing?
What are the key limitations and failure modes of LLM-based fuzzing approaches?
research_questions_zh: 在什么条件下LLM能够真正优于传统模糊测试技术？
对于哪些输入类型（结构化vs.二进制），LLM在模糊测试中提供的收益最大？
基于LLM的模糊测试方法的关键局限性和失败模式是什么？
conclusions: LLMs provide the greatest benefit in fuzzing structured inputs (such as JSON, XML, and protocol messages) but offer minimal gains for pure binary formats.
GPT-4 and CodeLlama each have advantages on different fuzzing tasks, with no single model performing best across all scenarios.
The primary value of LLMs lies in semantic-level input understanding and mutation, rather than replacing the coverage-guided mechanisms of traditional fuzzers.
conclusions_zh: LLM在处理结构化输入（如JSON、XML、协议消息）的模糊测试时收益最大，但在纯二进制格式上收效甚微。
GPT-4和CodeLlama在不同模糊测试任务上各有优势，没有单一模型在所有场景下表现最优。
LLM的主要价值在于语义级别的输入理解和变异，而非替代传统模糊器的覆盖率引导机制。

title: NEUZZ++: Neural Network Enhanced Fuzzing with LLM Integration
authors: Dongdong She, Kexin Pei, Baishakhi Ray, Dawn Song
abstract: Integrates LLMs into neural network-guided fuzzing for improved edge prediction and seed selection.
summary: Integrates LLMs into neural network-guided fuzzing for improved edge prediction and seed selection.
summary_zh: 将LLM集成到神经网络引导的模糊测试中，改善边缘预测和种子选择。

experiment.key_results: 25% more edge coverage than NEUZZ in 24h

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for integrates LLMs into neural network-guided fuzzing for improved edge prediction and seed selection.
Leverages Custom NN for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 25% more edge coverage than NEUZZ in 24h.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for integrates LLMs into neural network-guided fuzzing for improved edge prediction and seed selection.
利用 Custom NN for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 25% more edge coverage than NEUZZ in 24h.
abstract_zh: 将LLM集成到神经网络引导的模糊测试中，改善边缘预测和种子选择。
research_questions: Does integrating LLMs into neural network-guided fuzzing improve edge prediction and seed selection?
How much additional edge coverage can LLM integration provide over the original NEUZZ approach?
What is the optimal way to combine LLM-based prediction with neural network-guided mutation?
research_questions_zh: 将LLM整合到神经网络引导的模糊测试中是否能改善边预测和种子选择？
与原始NEUZZ方法相比，LLM整合能额外提供多少边覆盖率？
将基于LLM的预测与神经网络引导变异相结合的最优方式是什么？
conclusions: The LLM-enhanced version achieved 25% more edge coverage than the original NEUZZ within 24 hours.
The LLM's program comprehension capability enables more precise seed selection, prioritizing mutation of inputs more likely to trigger new paths.
The hybrid architecture effectively combines the LLM's high-level semantic understanding with the neural network's fast gradient-based mutation, achieving complementary strengths.
conclusions_zh: LLM增强版在24小时内比原始NEUZZ多实现了25%的边覆盖率。
LLM的程序理解能力使种子选择更加精准，优先变异更有可能触发新路径的输入。
混合架构将LLM的高层语义理解与神经网络的快速梯度变异有效结合，实现了优势互补。

title: SmartContractFuzz: A Survey of Smart Contract Fuzzing
authors: Yifan Huang, Zibin Zheng, Xiapu Luo
abstract: Surveys smart contract fuzzing techniques including LLM-enhanced approaches, comparing 20+ tools.
summary: Surveys smart contract fuzzing techniques including LLM-enhanced approaches, comparing 20+ tools.
summary_zh: 综述智能合约模糊测试技术（包括LLM增强方法），比较20+工具。

experiment.key_results: Reviews 20+ smart contract fuzzing tools

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for surveys smart contract fuzzing techniques including LLM-enhanced approaches, comparing 20+ tools.
Leverages  for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Reviews 20+ smart contract fuzzing tools.
Targets smart contract security, addressing unique challenges of blockchain-based systems.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for surveys smart contract fuzzing techniques including LLM-enhanced approaches, comparing 20+ tools.
利用  for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Reviews 20+ smart contract fuzzing tools.
针对 smart contract security, addressing unique challenges of blockchain-based systems.
abstract_zh: 综述智能合约模糊测试技术（包括LLM增强方法），比较20+工具。
research_questions: What are the existing smart contract fuzzing techniques and how do they compare in terms of effectiveness and coverage?
How can LLM-enhanced approaches improve smart contract fuzzing beyond traditional mutation-based methods?
What are the key challenges unique to smart contract fuzzing, such as handling EVM semantics and transaction sequences?
research_questions_zh: 现有的智能合约模糊测试技术有哪些，它们在有效性和覆盖率方面如何比较？
基于LLM的增强方法如何在传统变异方法之外改进智能合约模糊测试？
智能合约模糊测试面临哪些独特挑战，如处理EVM语义和交易序列？
conclusions: The survey systematically reviews and categorizes over 20 smart contract fuzzing tools published between 2018 and 2024.
LLM-enhanced approaches demonstrate stronger capability in generating semantically valid transaction sequences compared to random mutation strategies.
Key remaining challenges include handling cross-contract interactions and scaling to complex DeFi protocol compositions.
conclusions_zh: 该综述系统地回顾并分类了2018年至2024年间发表的20多种智能合约模糊测试工具。
与随机变异策略相比，LLM增强方法在生成语义有效的交易序列方面表现出更强的能力。
关键的未解决挑战包括处理跨合约交互以及扩展到复杂的DeFi协议组合。

title: Scaling Kernel Fuzzing with LLM-Generated Specifications
authors: Hao Chen, Chenyuan Yang, Lingming Zhang
abstract: Scales kernel fuzzing by using LLMs to generate specifications for hundreds of kernel subsystems.
summary: Scales kernel fuzzing by using LLMs to generate specifications for hundreds of kernel subsystems.
summary_zh: 利用LLM为数百个内核子系统生成规范来扩展内核模糊测试。

experiment.key_results: Doubled Syzkaller's syscall coverage with LLM-generated specs

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for scales kernel fuzzing by using LLMs to generate specifications for hundreds of kernel subsystems.
Leverages GPT-4 for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Doubled Syzkaller's syscall coverage with LLM-generated specs.
Addresses OS kernel security, targeting complex system-level vulnerabilities.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for scales kernel fuzzing by using LLMs to generate specifications for hundreds of kernel subsystems.
利用 GPT-4 for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Doubled Syzkaller's syscall coverage with LLM-generated specs.
解决 OS kernel security, targeting complex system-level vulnerabilities.
abstract_zh: 利用LLM为数百个内核子系统生成规范来扩展内核模糊测试。
research_questions: Can LLMs automatically generate accurate syscall specifications for kernel subsystems that lack manual Syzkaller descriptions?
How does the coverage of LLM-generated kernel specifications compare to hand-written Syzkaller specifications?
What fraction of previously unfuzzed kernel subsystems can be reached through LLM-generated specifications?
research_questions_zh: LLM能否为缺乏手动Syzkaller描述的内核子系统自动生成准确的系统调用规范？
LLM生成的内核规范与手写的Syzkaller规范在覆盖率方面如何比较？
通过LLM生成的规范可以覆盖多少此前未被模糊测试的内核子系统？
conclusions: LLM-generated specifications doubled Syzkaller's syscall coverage, enabling fuzzing of hundreds of previously unreachable kernel subsystems.
GPT-4 can produce syntactically valid and semantically meaningful Syzkaller specifications with minimal human guidance.
The approach discovered multiple new kernel bugs in subsystems that had never been fuzzed before due to lack of specifications.
conclusions_zh: LLM生成的规范使Syzkaller的系统调用覆盖率翻倍，使数百个此前不可达的内核子系统得以进行模糊测试。
GPT-4能够在最少的人工指导下生成语法有效且语义有意义的Syzkaller规范。
该方法在此前由于缺乏规范而从未被模糊测试的子系统中发现了多个新的内核漏洞。

title: Compiler Fuzzing: Much Achieved, Still Much To Do
authors: Chenyuan Yang, Yinlin Deng, Lingming Zhang
abstract: Surveys compiler fuzzing including recent LLM-based approaches, analyzing coverage and bug-finding effectiveness.
summary: Surveys compiler fuzzing including recent LLM-based approaches, analyzing coverage and bug-finding effectiveness.
summary_zh: 综述编译器模糊测试（包括最近的LLM方法），分析覆盖率和漏洞发现效果。

experiment.key_results: Reviews 30+ compiler fuzzing techniques from 2010-2024

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for surveys compiler fuzzing including recent LLM-based approaches, analyzing coverage and bug-finding effectiveness.
Leverages  for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Reviews 30+ compiler fuzzing techniques from 2010-2024.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for surveys compiler fuzzing including recent LLM-based approaches, analyzing coverage and bug-finding effectiveness.
利用  for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Reviews 30+ compiler fuzzing techniques from 2010-2024.
abstract_zh: 综述编译器模糊测试（包括最近的LLM方法），分析覆盖率和漏洞发现效果。
research_questions: What are the main compiler fuzzing strategies developed between 2010 and 2024, and how do they differ in bug-finding methodology?
How do recent LLM-based program generation approaches compare to traditional grammar-based test case generators for compiler testing?
What types of compiler bugs (miscompilations, crashes, performance issues) are most effectively found by each fuzzing strategy?
research_questions_zh: 2010年至2024年间开发的主要编译器模糊测试策略有哪些，它们在漏洞发现方法上有何不同？
最近基于LLM的程序生成方法与传统基于语法的编译器测试用例生成器相比效果如何？
每种模糊测试策略最能有效发现哪些类型的编译器漏洞（误编译、崩溃、性能问题）？
conclusions: The survey covers 30+ compiler fuzzing techniques and identifies a clear trend toward LLM-based program generation in recent years.
LLM-based approaches excel at generating semantically diverse test programs but still struggle with producing programs that exercise deep optimization paths.
Differential testing remains the most effective oracle strategy, with most compiler bugs discovered through cross-compiler comparison.
conclusions_zh: 该综述涵盖了30多种编译器模糊测试技术，并明确指出近年来向基于LLM的程序生成方向发展的趋势。
基于LLM的方法擅长生成语义多样的测试程序，但在生成能触发深层优化路径的程序方面仍有不足。
差异测试仍然是最有效的预言策略，大多数编译器漏洞通过跨编译器比较发现。

title: Memory-Efficient LLM-Based Program Repair via Token Compression
authors: Yiran Chen, Hao Li, Dawn Song
abstract: Addresses context window limitations for LLM repair by compressing code tokens while preserving semantics.
summary: Addresses context window limitations for LLM repair by compressing code tokens while preserving semantics.
summary_zh: 通过压缩代码令牌同时保留语义来解决LLM修复的上下文窗口限制。

experiment.key_results: Processes 3x more context with same token budget

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for addresses context window limitations for LLM repair by compressing code tokens while preserving semantics.
Utilizes GPT-4, Llama-3 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Processes 3x more context with same token budget.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for addresses context window limitations for LLM repair by compressing code tokens while preserving semantics.
利用 GPT-4, Llama-3 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Processes 3x more context with same token budget.
abstract_zh: 通过压缩代码令牌同时保留语义来解决LLM修复的上下文窗口限制。
research_questions: How can code tokens be compressed to fit larger code contexts within LLM context windows without losing semantic information critical for repair?
What is the impact of token compression on patch generation accuracy compared to truncating the input context?
How does the compression approach scale across different LLM architectures and context window sizes?
research_questions_zh: 如何压缩代码token以在LLM上下文窗口内容纳更大的代码上下文，同时不丢失对修复关键的语义信息？
与截断输入上下文相比，token压缩对补丁生成准确性的影响如何？
压缩方法在不同LLM架构和上下文窗口大小下的可扩展性如何？
conclusions: The proposed token compression method processes 3x more code context within the same token budget while preserving semantic completeness.
Compression-based context inclusion improves patch correctness by 18% over naive truncation on the Defects4J benchmark.
The approach is model-agnostic and benefits both GPT-4 and Llama-3, with larger gains on models with smaller context windows.
conclusions_zh: 所提出的token压缩方法在相同的token预算内处理3倍的代码上下文，同时保持语义完整性。
基于压缩的上下文包含方法在Defects4J基准测试上比简单截断提高了18%的补丁正确率。
该方法与模型无关，同时惠及GPT-4和Llama-3，在上下文窗口较小的模型上增益更大。

title: Safe Program Repair: Ensuring Patches Don't Break Other Functionality
authors: Qiushi Wang, Yiling Lou, Xin Peng
abstract: Ensures LLM-generated patches don't introduce regressions by analyzing semantic dependencies.
summary: Ensures LLM-generated patches don't introduce regressions by analyzing semantic dependencies.
summary_zh: 通过分析语义依赖确保LLM生成的补丁不引入回归。

experiment.key_results: Reduces regression rate from 22% to 5% with dependency analysis

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for ensures LLM-generated patches don't introduce regressions by analyzing semantic dependencies.
Utilizes GPT-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Reduces regression rate from 22% to 5% with dependency analysis.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for ensures LLM-generated patches don't introduce regressions by analyzing semantic dependencies.
利用 GPT-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Reduces regression rate from 22% to 5% with dependency analysis.
abstract_zh: 通过分析语义依赖确保LLM生成的补丁不引入回归。
research_questions: How frequently do LLM-generated patches introduce regressions in unrelated functionality?
Can semantic dependency analysis effectively predict and prevent regression-inducing patches before deployment?
What characteristics of patches correlate most strongly with regression risk?
research_questions_zh: LLM生成的补丁在不相关功能中引入回归问题的频率有多高？
语义依赖分析能否在部署前有效预测和防止引起回归的补丁？
补丁的哪些特征与回归风险最密切相关？
conclusions: Without safety checks, 22% of LLM-generated patches introduce regressions; the proposed dependency analysis reduces this rate to 5%.
Patches modifying shared state or cross-module interfaces carry the highest regression risk and benefit most from dependency-aware filtering.
The safety analysis overhead is minimal (under 2 seconds per patch) and integrates seamlessly into CI/CD workflows.
conclusions_zh: 在没有安全检查的情况下，22%的LLM生成补丁会引入回归问题；所提出的依赖分析将此比率降至5%。
修改共享状态或跨模块接口的补丁具有最高的回归风险，最能从依赖感知过滤中受益。
安全分析的开销很小（每个补丁不到2秒），可无缝集成到CI/CD工作流中。

title: MultiRepair: Repairing Code Across Multiple Programming Languages
authors: Junhao Li, Xin He, Xiao Yang
abstract: Fine-tunes a single model for program repair across 10 languages, studying cross-lingual repair transfer.
summary: Fine-tunes a single model for program repair across 10 languages, studying cross-lingual repair transfer.
summary_zh: 微调单个模型在10种语言上进行程序修复，研究跨语言修复迁移。

experiment.key_results: Single model repairs bugs in 10 languages with competitive performance

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for fine-tunes a single model for program repair across 10 languages, studying cross-lingual repair transfer.
Utilizes CodeLlama for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Single model repairs bugs in 10 languages with competitive performance.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for fine-tunes a single model for program repair across 10 languages, studying cross-lingual repair transfer.
利用 CodeLlama for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Single model repairs bugs in 10 languages with competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 微调单个模型在10种语言上进行程序修复，研究跨语言修复迁移。
research_questions: Can a single fine-tuned LLM effectively repair bugs across 10 different programming languages simultaneously?
Does cross-lingual repair knowledge transfer occur, and can training on one language improve repair performance on another?
How does multi-language fine-tuning compare to language-specific models on standard repair benchmarks?
research_questions_zh: 单个微调的LLM能否同时有效修复10种不同编程语言的漏洞？
跨语言修复知识是否会发生迁移，在一种语言上的训练能否提高在另一种语言上的修复性能？
多语言微调与特定语言模型在标准修复基准上的表现如何比较？
conclusions: A single CodeLlama model fine-tuned with LoRA across 10 languages achieves competitive repair performance compared to language-specific models.
Significant positive transfer is observed between syntactically similar languages (e.g., Java to C#, Python to Ruby), improving fix rates by 8-15%.
Low-resource languages benefit disproportionately from multilingual training, with fix rates doubling for languages like Rust and Go.
conclusions_zh: 单个使用LoRA在10种语言上微调的CodeLlama模型与特定语言模型相比达到了有竞争力的修复性能。
在语法相似的语言之间（如Java到C#、Python到Ruby）观察到显著的正向迁移，修复率提高8-15%。
低资源语言从多语言训练中获益尤为显著，Rust和Go等语言的修复率翻倍。

title: AutoPR: Automated Pull Request Generation with LLMs
authors: Kechi Zhang, Ge Li, Zhi Jin
abstract: Generates complete pull requests including code changes, descriptions, and test updates using LLMs.
summary: Generates complete pull requests including code changes, descriptions, and test updates using LLMs.
summary_zh: 使用LLM生成完整的拉取请求，包括代码变更、描述和测试更新。

experiment.key_results: 32% of generated PRs merged without modifications

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for generates complete pull requests including code changes, descriptions, and test updates using LLMs.
Utilizes GPT-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 32% of generated PRs merged without modifications.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for generates complete pull requests including code changes, descriptions, and test updates using LLMs.
利用 GPT-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 32% of generated PRs merged without modifications.
abstract_zh: 使用LLM生成完整的拉取请求，包括代码变更、描述和测试更新。
research_questions: Can LLMs generate complete pull requests (code changes, descriptions, and test updates) that are acceptable to human reviewers?
What proportion of LLM-generated pull requests can be merged without manual modifications?
How does the quality of auto-generated PR descriptions and test updates compare to developer-written ones?
research_questions_zh: LLM能否生成完整的拉取请求（代码更改、描述和测试更新）并被人工审查者接受？
LLM生成的拉取请求中有多少比例可以无需手动修改即可合并？
自动生成的PR描述和测试更新的质量与开发者编写的相比如何？
conclusions: 32% of GPT-4-generated pull requests were merged by human reviewers without any modifications.
Auto-generated PR descriptions were rated as more informative than developer-written ones in 45% of blind comparisons.
Test updates remain the weakest component, with only 60% of auto-generated tests being compilable and relevant.
conclusions_zh: 32%的GPT-4生成的拉取请求被人工审查者无需任何修改即合并。
在45%的盲评比较中，自动生成的PR描述被评为比开发者编写的更具信息量。
测试更新仍是最薄弱的环节，仅60%的自动生成测试可编译且相关。

title: EmergencyFix: Rapid Vulnerability Patching Under Time Pressure
authors: Yannic Liu, Marcel Bohme, Van-Thuan Pham
abstract: Evaluates LLM repair quality under time constraints simulating emergency patching scenarios.
summary: Evaluates LLM repair quality under time constraints simulating emergency patching scenarios.
summary_zh: 评估模拟紧急修补场景下时间约束下的LLM修复质量。

experiment.key_results: LLMs generate usable emergency patches 3x faster than developers

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for LLM repair quality under time constraints simulating emergency patching scenarios.
Utilizes GPT-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: LLMs generate usable emergency patches 3x faster than developers.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for LLM repair quality under time constraints simulating emergency patching scenarios.
利用 GPT-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: LLMs generate usable emergency patches 3x faster than developers.
abstract_zh: 评估模拟紧急修补场景下时间约束下的LLM修复质量。
research_questions: How does the quality of LLM-generated patches change under simulated emergency time constraints?
Can LLMs provide usable stopgap patches faster than human developers during security emergencies?
What trade-offs exist between patch generation speed and correctness in emergency scenarios?
research_questions_zh: 在模拟的紧急时间约束下，LLM生成的补丁质量如何变化？
在安全紧急情况下，LLM能否比人类开发者更快地提供可用的临时补丁？
在紧急场景中，补丁生成速度与正确性之间存在怎样的权衡？
conclusions: LLMs generate usable emergency patches approximately 3x faster than experienced developers in time-pressured scenarios.
Emergency patches have lower overall correctness (58%) compared to untimed generation (72%), but provide critical stopgap protection.
The most effective emergency strategy is generating multiple candidate patches in parallel and selecting the best one via quick validation.
conclusions_zh: 在时间紧迫的场景下，LLM生成可用的紧急补丁的速度约为经验丰富的开发者的3倍。
紧急补丁的整体正确率（58%）低于非限时生成（72%），但能提供关键的临时保护。
最有效的紧急策略是并行生成多个候选补丁，并通过快速验证选择最佳方案。

title: VulnScan-2025: Next-Generation LLM Vulnerability Scanner with RAG
authors: Hao Li, Chao Zhang, Dawn Song

experiment.key_results: RAG-enhanced detection achieves 88% F1, 20% above zero-shot

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for next-generation vulnerability scanner combining RAG with GPT-4o for context-aware vulnerability detection across codebas.
Leverages GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: RAG-enhanced detection achieves 88% F1, 20% above zero-shot.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for next-generation vulnerability scanner combining RAG with GPT-4o for context-aware vulnerability detection across codebas.
利用 GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: RAG-enhanced detection achieves 88% F1, 20% above zero-shot.
abstract_zh: 结合RAG与GPT-4o的下一代漏洞扫描器，用于跨代码库的上下文感知漏洞检测。
research_questions: How does retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) improve LLM vulnerability detection compared to zero-shot prompting?
What types of vulnerability knowledge are most valuable when retrieved for context-aware detection?
How does VulnScan's RAG-enhanced approach perform across different vulnerability categories and codebases?
research_questions_zh: 与零样本提示相比，检索增强生成（RAG）如何改善LLM的漏洞检测能力？
在上下文感知检测中，哪些类型的漏洞知识在检索时最有价值？
VulnScan的RAG增强方法在不同漏洞类别和代码库中的表现如何？
conclusions: RAG-enhanced detection achieves 88% F1 score, a 20 percentage point improvement over zero-shot LLM prompting.
Retrieving similar historical CVE descriptions and fix patterns provides the most informative context for vulnerability identification.
GPT-4o with RAG outperforms Claude-3.5 with RAG by 5% F1, though Claude-3.5 produces fewer false positives overall.
conclusions_zh: RAG增强的检测达到88%的F1分数，比零样本LLM提示提高了20个百分点。
检索相似的历史CVE描述和修复模式为漏洞识别提供了最有价值的上下文信息。
带RAG的GPT-4o在F1分数上比带RAG的Claude-3.5高出5%，但Claude-3.5整体产生的误报更少。

title: AgentAudit: Autonomous Security Auditing with Multi-Agent LLMs
authors: Yue Wang, Jialong Liu, Chao Zhang

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for multi-agent LLM system for autonomous security auditing, with specialized agents for code analysis, threat modeling, and.

Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.

提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.

abstract_zh: 用于自主安全审计的多代理LLM系统，包含代码分析、威胁建模和报告生成的专用代理。
research_questions: Can a multi-agent LLM system with specialized roles replicate the security findings of human audit teams?
How does role specialization (code analysis, threat modeling, report generation) impact the quality of automated audits?
What proportion of vulnerabilities found by human audit teams can the autonomous system independently discover?
research_questions_zh: 具有专业角色的多智能体LLM系统能否复现人工审计团队的安全发现？

自主系统能独立发现人工审计团队所发现漏洞的多少比例？
conclusions: The multi-agent system independently discovers 75% of the vulnerabilities found by professional human audit teams.
Specialized agent roles improve audit completeness by 35% compared to a single general-purpose agent.
The system has been deployed at 3 enterprises, reducing average audit time from weeks to hours while maintaining finding quality.
conclusions_zh: 多智能体系统独立发现了专业人工审计团队所发现漏洞的75%。
专业化的智能体角色相比单一通用智能体将审计完整性提高了35%。
该系统已在3家企业部署，将平均审计时间从数周缩短到数小时，同时保持发现质量。

title: DeepVuln: Foundation Models for Vulnerability Detection
authors: Yikun Zhang, Ge Li, Zhi Jin
abstract: Pre-trains a foundation model specifically for vulnerability detection on 10M+ functions, achieving SOTA across all benchmarks.
summary: Pre-trains a foundation model specifically for vulnerability detection on 10M+ functions, achieving SOTA across all benchmarks.
summary_zh: 在1000万+函数上专门预训练漏洞检测基础模型，在所有基准上达到最先进水平。

experiment.key_results: 33B model achieves 90% F1 on DiverseVul, new SOTA

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for pre-trains a foundation model specifically for vulnerability detection on 10M+ functions, achieving SOTA across all benc.
Leverages DeepVuln for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 33B model achieves 90% F1 on DiverseVul, new SOTA.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for pre-trains a foundation model specifically for vulnerability detection on 10M+ functions, achieving SOTA across all benc.
利用 DeepVuln for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 33B model achieves 90% F1 on DiverseVul, new SOTA.
abstract_zh: 在1000万+函数上专门预训练漏洞检测基础模型，在所有基准上达到最先进水平。
research_questions: Can a foundation model pre-trained specifically on vulnerability-related code outperform general-purpose code LLMs at vulnerability detection?
How does model scale (7B, 13B, 33B) affect vulnerability detection accuracy on standard benchmarks?
What pre-training data composition and objectives are most effective for learning vulnerability patterns?
research_questions_zh: 专门在漏洞相关代码上预训练的基础模型能否在漏洞检测方面优于通用代码LLM？
模型规模（7B、13B、33B）如何影响标准基准上的漏洞检测准确性？
什么样的预训练数据组成和目标最能有效学习漏洞模式？
conclusions: The 33B DeepVuln model achieves 90% F1 on DiverseVul, establishing a new state-of-the-art for vulnerability detection.
Scaling from 7B to 33B provides consistent improvements, with the largest gains (8% F1) in detecting complex multi-function vulnerabilities.
Pre-training on 10M+ functions with a vulnerability-aware contrastive objective outperforms standard next-token prediction by 12% F1.
conclusions_zh: 33B的DeepVuln模型在DiverseVul上达到90%的F1分数，创造了漏洞检测的新最优记录。
从7B扩展到33B带来持续改进，在检测复杂多函数漏洞方面获得最大增益（8% F1）。
在1000万+函数上使用漏洞感知对比学习目标进行预训练，比标准的下一token预测高出12% F1。

title: Real-Time LLM Vulnerability Detection in IDE
authors: Yizheng Chen, David Wagner
abstract: IDE-integrated real-time vulnerability detection using lightweight LLMs, providing instant feedback as developers type.
summary: IDE-integrated real-time vulnerability detection using lightweight LLMs, providing instant feedback as developers type.
summary_zh: IDE集成的实时漏洞检测，使用轻量级LLM在开发者输入时提供即时反馈。

experiment.key_results: <100ms detection latency in IDE with 75% accuracy

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for IDE-integrated real-time vulnerability detection using lightweight LLMs, providing instant feedback as developers type.
Leverages Phi-3, Gemma-2 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: <100ms detection latency in IDE with 75% accuracy.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for IDE-integrated real-time vulnerability detection using lightweight LLMs, providing instant feedback as developers type.
利用 Phi-3, Gemma-2 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: <100ms detection latency in IDE with 75% accuracy.
abstract_zh: IDE集成的实时漏洞检测，使用轻量级LLM在开发者输入时提供即时反馈。
research_questions: Can lightweight LLMs achieve sub-100ms vulnerability detection latency suitable for real-time IDE integration?
What accuracy trade-offs are necessary when using small (3B) models compared to full-scale LLMs for vulnerability detection?
How do developers perceive and respond to real-time vulnerability alerts during their coding workflow?
research_questions_zh: 轻量级LLM能否实现适合实时IDE集成的亚100毫秒漏洞检测延迟？
使用小型（3B）模型与全尺寸LLM进行漏洞检测时，需要做出哪些准确性权衡？
开发者在编码工作流中如何感知和响应实时漏洞警报？
conclusions: Phi-3 and Gemma-2 at 3B parameters achieve under 100ms detection latency while maintaining 75% accuracy on standard vulnerability benchmarks.
The accuracy gap between 3B IDE models and full GPT-4o is approximately 15%, primarily affecting complex cross-function vulnerabilities.
Developer studies show 80% of participants prefer real-time alerts over batch scanning, and 65% acted on flagged issues immediately.
conclusions_zh: 3B参数的Phi-3和Gemma-2实现了低于100毫秒的检测延迟，同时在标准漏洞基准上保持75%的准确率。
3B IDE模型与完整GPT-4o之间的准确性差距约为15%，主要影响复杂的跨函数漏洞。
开发者研究表明，80%的参与者偏好实时警报而非批量扫描，65%会立即对标记的问题采取行动。

title: AI-Powered Software Supply Chain Security
authors: Zhuotao Liu, Yufei Wu
abstract: Comprehensive AI framework for supply chain security covering dependency analysis, malicious package detection, and build integrity verification.
summary: Comprehensive AI framework for supply chain security covering dependency analysis, malicious package detection, and build integrity verification.

Leverages GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Detects 95% of supply chain attacks with 3% FPR.
Addresses supply-chain, typosquatting, dependency-confusion vulnerability types, expanding coverage of security analysis.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for comprehensive AI framework for supply chain security covering dependency analysis, malicious package detection, and buil.
利用 GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.

解决 supply-chain, typosquatting, dependency-confusion vulnerability types, expanding coverage of security analysis.
abstract_zh: 涵盖依赖分析、恶意包检测和构建完整性验证的全面AI供应链安全框架。
research_questions: Can LLMs effectively detect supply chain attacks including typosquatting, dependency confusion, and malicious package injection?
How does an AI-powered framework combining dependency analysis, malicious package detection, and build integrity compare to existing tools?
What features of malicious packages are most informative for LLM-based detection?
research_questions_zh: LLM能否有效检测包括域名仿冒、依赖混淆和恶意包注入在内的供应链攻击？
结合依赖分析、恶意包检测和构建完整性验证的AI驱动框架与现有工具相比如何？
恶意包的哪些特征对基于LLM的检测最具信息量？
conclusions: The framework detects 95% of supply chain attacks with only a 3% false positive rate across npm, PyPI, and Maven repositories.
LLM-based semantic analysis of package behavior outperforms signature-based approaches by 30% on novel attack variants.
Combining static metadata analysis with LLM-powered code behavior understanding provides the strongest detection signal.
conclusions_zh: 该框架在npm、PyPI和Maven仓库中检测出95%的供应链攻击，误报率仅为3%。
基于LLM的包行为语义分析在新型攻击变体上比基于签名的方法高出30%。
将静态元数据分析与LLM驱动的代码行为理解相结合提供了最强的检测信号。

title: Zero-Day Vulnerability Discovery via Reasoning LLMs
authors: Yifan Wu, Shaohua Wen
abstract: Uses chain-of-thought reasoning in LLMs to discover zero-day vulnerabilities by analyzing code patterns similar to known CVEs.
summary: Uses chain-of-thought reasoning in LLMs to discover zero-day vulnerabilities by analyzing code patterns similar to known CVEs.
summary_zh: 利用LLM中的思维链推理通过分析与已知CVE相似的代码模式来发现零日漏洞。

experiment.key_results: Discovered 15 new zero-day vulnerabilities in popular OSS projects
experiment.real_world_impact: 15 new CVEs assigned

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for chain-of-thought reasoning in LLMs to discover zero-day vulnerabilities by analyzing code patterns similar to known CVEs.
Leverages GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Discovered 15 new zero-day vulnerabilities in popular OSS projects.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for chain-of-thought reasoning in LLMs to discover zero-day vulnerabilities by analyzing code patterns similar to known CVEs.
利用 GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Discovered 15 new zero-day vulnerabilities in popular OSS projects.
abstract_zh: 利用LLM中的思维链推理通过分析与已知CVE相似的代码模式来发现零日漏洞。
research_questions: Can chain-of-thought reasoning enable LLMs to discover zero-day vulnerabilities by recognizing patterns similar to known CVEs?
How do GPT-4o and Claude-3.5 compare in their ability to reason about novel vulnerability patterns?
What is the false positive rate and practical exploitability of LLM-discovered zero-day vulnerabilities?
research_questions_zh: 思维链推理能否使LLM通过识别与已知CVE相似的模式来发现零日漏洞？
GPT-4o和Claude-3.5在推理新型漏洞模式方面的能力如何比较？
LLM发现的零日漏洞的误报率和实际可利用性如何？
conclusions: The approach discovered 15 previously unknown zero-day vulnerabilities in popular open-source projects, all receiving CVE assignments.
Chain-of-thought reasoning improves zero-day discovery rate by 3x compared to direct prompting, as it enables multi-step vulnerability analysis.
GPT-4o discovers more candidates overall, while Claude-3.5 has a higher precision rate with fewer false positives per discovery.
conclusions_zh: 该方法在流行的开源项目中发现了15个此前未知的零日漏洞，全部获得CVE编号。
思维链推理将零日漏洞发现率提高了3倍，因为它能够进行多步骤漏洞分析。
GPT-4o总体发现更多候选漏洞，而Claude-3.5的精确率更高，每次发现的误报更少。

title: LLM-Reviewer: AI-Powered Security Code Review at Scale
authors: Xian Yang, Jian Chen
abstract: Production-scale LLM system for automated security code review, deployed across 500+ repositories with developer feedback loop.
summary: Production-scale LLM system for automated security code review, deployed across 500+ repositories with developer feedback loop.
summary_zh: 用于自动安全代码审查的生产规模LLM系统，部署于500+仓库并具有开发者反馈循环。

experiment.key_results: Catches 70% of security issues pre-merge, 90% developer satisfaction
experiment.real_world_impact: Deployed at major tech company

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for production-scale LLM system for automated security code review, deployed across 500+ repositories with developer feedbac.
Leverages GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.

利用 GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.

conclusions: The system catches 70% of security issues before merge, with 90% developer satisfaction in production deployment across 500+ repositories.
LLM review excels at detecting injection vulnerabilities and authentication flaws but underperforms on business logic errors.
Developer trust increases over time: satisfaction rises from 72% in month one to 90% after three months of continuous use.
conclusions_zh: 该系统在合并前捕获70%的安全问题，在500多个仓库的生产部署中开发者满意度达90%。
LLM审查擅长检测注入漏洞和认证缺陷，但在业务逻辑错误方面表现不足。
开发者信任度随时间增长：满意度从第一个月的72%上升到持续使用三个月后的90%。

title: Multimodal Vulnerability Detection: Code, Documentation, and Runtime Traces
authors: Chen Li, Yue Wang
abstract: Combines code, documentation, and runtime execution traces in multimodal LLMs for improved vulnerability detection.
summary: Combines code, documentation, and runtime execution traces in multimodal LLMs for improved vulnerability detection.
summary_zh: 在多模态LLM中结合代码、文档和运行时执行轨迹以改进漏洞检测。

experiment.key_results: Multimodal approach improves detection by 25% over code-only

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for combines code, documentation, and runtime execution traces in multimodal LLMs for improved vulnerability detection.
Leverages GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Multimodal approach improves detection by 25% over code-only.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for combines code, documentation, and runtime execution traces in multimodal LLMs for improved vulnerability detection.
利用 GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Multimodal approach improves detection by 25% over code-only.
abstract_zh: 在多模态LLM中结合代码、文档和运行时执行轨迹以改进漏洞检测。
research_questions: Does combining code, documentation, and runtime execution traces in a multimodal approach improve vulnerability detection over code-only analysis?
Which modality (documentation, runtime traces) provides the most complementary signal to source code for vulnerability identification?
How do multimodal LLMs handle inconsistencies between code behavior and its documentation?
research_questions_zh: 将代码、文档和运行时执行轨迹结合的多模态方法是否能提高相比仅代码分析的漏洞检测能力？
哪种模态（文档、运行时轨迹）为源代码的漏洞识别提供最互补的信号？
多模态LLM如何处理代码行为与其文档之间的不一致？
conclusions: The multimodal approach improves vulnerability detection F1 by 25% over code-only analysis on the same benchmark.
Runtime execution traces provide the strongest complementary signal, contributing 15% of the total improvement over code-only baselines.
Inconsistencies between documentation and actual code behavior serve as strong vulnerability indicators, with 40% of detected issues arising from such mismatches.
conclusions_zh: 多模态方法在相同基准上的漏洞检测F1比仅代码分析提高了25%。
运行时执行轨迹提供了最强的互补信号，贡献了相对仅代码基线总改进的15%。
文档与实际代码行为之间的不一致是强有力的漏洞指标，40%的检测到的问题源于此类不匹配。

title: Fuzz4All v2: Universal Fuzzing with Reasoning LLMs
authors: Chunqiu Steven Xia, Lingming Zhang
abstract: Extends Fuzz4All with reasoning LLMs (o1/Claude-3.5) for deeper code understanding and more effective fuzzing across 8 languages.
summary: Extends Fuzz4All with reasoning LLMs (o1/Claude-3.5) for deeper code understanding and more effective fuzzing across 8 languages.
summary_zh: 使用推理LLM（o1/Claude-3.5）扩展Fuzz4All，实现更深层代码理解和跨8种语言的更有效模糊测试。

experiment.key_results: Found 150+ bugs across 8 compilers/interpreters, 2x improvement over v1

contributions: Proposes Fuzz4All v2, a novel approach for extends Fuzz4All with reasoning LLMs (o1/Claude-3.5) for deeper code understanding and more effective fuzzing across 8 l.
Leverages o1, Claude-3.5 for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Found 150+ bugs across 8 compilers/interpreters, 2x improvement over v1.
contributions_zh: 提出 Fuzz4All v2, a novel approach for extends Fuzz4All with reasoning LLMs (o1/Claude-3.5) for deeper code understanding and more effective fuzzing across 8 l.
利用 o1, Claude-3.5 for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Found 150+ bugs across 8 compilers/interpreters, 2x improvement over v1.
abstract_zh: 使用推理LLM（o1/Claude-3.5）扩展Fuzz4All，实现更深层代码理解和跨8种语言的更有效模糊测试。
research_questions: Does using reasoning LLMs (o1, Claude-3.5) improve universal fuzzing effectiveness compared to standard LLMs used in Fuzz4All v1?
How does deeper code understanding from reasoning models translate to more effective test case generation across different target languages?
What is the performance gain from reasoning-based fuzzing across 8 compilers and interpreters?
research_questions_zh: 与Fuzz4All v1中使用的标准LLM相比，使用推理型LLM（o1、Claude-3.5）是否能提高通用模糊测试的有效性？
推理模型带来的更深层代码理解如何转化为针对不同目标语言更有效的测试用例生成？
基于推理的模糊测试在8种编译器和解释器上的性能增益如何？
conclusions: Fuzz4All v2 discovered 150+ bugs across 8 compilers/interpreters, representing a 2x improvement over the original Fuzz4All.
Reasoning LLMs generate test programs that explore 35% more unique code paths by better understanding language semantics and edge cases.
o1 excels at generating programs targeting type system and optimization bugs, while Claude-3.5 produces more diverse syntactic variations.
conclusions_zh: Fuzz4All v2在8种编译器/解释器中发现了150多个漏洞，比原版Fuzz4All提升了2倍。
推理型LLM通过更好地理解语言语义和边界情况，生成的测试程序探索了35%更多的独特代码路径。
o1擅长生成针对类型系统和优化漏洞的程序，而Claude-3.5产生更多样的语法变体。

title: HarnessBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for LLM Fuzz Harness Generation

What standardized metrics and evaluation framework should be used to fairly compare LLM-generated fuzz harnesses?
What are the most common failure modes when LLMs generate fuzz harnesses for complex library APIs?
research_questions_zh: 不同的LLM在为多样化的库和语言生成有效、可编译的模糊测试驱动方面如何比较？
应使用什么标准化的指标和评估框架来公平比较LLM生成的模糊测试驱动？
LLM为复杂库API生成模糊测试驱动时最常见的失败模式是什么？
conclusions: GPT-4o leads with an 82% valid harness rate across 50 libraries, followed by Claude-3.5 at 78% and DeepSeek-V3 at 71%.
The most common failure modes are incorrect API usage patterns (35%), missing initialization sequences (28%), and type mismatches (20%).
The benchmark reveals that harness quality varies dramatically by library complexity, with simple string libraries at 95% success versus cryptographic libraries at 45%.
conclusions_zh: GPT-4o在50个库中以82%的有效驱动率领先，其次是Claude-3.5的78%和DeepSeek-V3的71%。
最常见的失败模式是不正确的API使用模式（35%）、缺少初始化序列（28%）和类型不匹配（20%）。
基准测试显示驱动质量因库复杂性而差异巨大，简单字符串库的成功率为95%，而加密库仅为45%。

title: OSS-Fuzz-AI: Scaling Automated Fuzzing with AI to 1000+ Projects
authors: Jonathan Metzman, Laszlo Szekeres
abstract: Scales OSS-Fuzz-Gen to 1000+ projects using improved LLM pipelines with iterative compilation feedback.
