experiment.real_world_impact: Deployed in production OSS-Fuzz

contributions: Proposes OSS-Fuzz-AI, a novel approach for scales OSS-Fuzz-Gen to 1000+ projects using improved LLM pipelines with iterative compilation feedback.
Leverages Gemini-1.5, GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Generated effective harnesses for 1200+ projects, found 200+ new bugs.
contributions_zh: 提出 OSS-Fuzz-AI, a novel approach for scales OSS-Fuzz-Gen to 1000+ projects using improved LLM pipelines with iterative compilation feedback.
利用 Gemini-1.5, GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Generated effective harnesses for 1200+ projects, found 200+ new bugs.
abstract_zh: 将OSS-Fuzz-Gen扩展到1000+项目，使用改进的LLM管道和迭代编译反馈。
research_questions: Can LLM-generated fuzz harnesses scale to cover 1000+ open-source projects in the OSS-Fuzz ecosystem?
How does iterative compilation feedback improve the quality and success rate of auto-generated harnesses?
What is the real-world bug discovery rate of LLM-generated harnesses compared to human-written OSS-Fuzz harnesses?
research_questions_zh: LLM生成的模糊测试驱动能否扩展到覆盖OSS-Fuzz生态系统中的1000多个开源项目？
迭代编译反馈如何提高自动生成驱动的质量和成功率？
LLM生成的驱动与人工编写的OSS-Fuzz驱动相比，实际漏洞发现率如何？
conclusions: The system generated effective fuzz harnesses for 1200+ projects and discovered 200+ previously unknown bugs in production open-source software.
Iterative compilation feedback increases harness compilation success rate from 55% to 85% over 3 feedback rounds.
The system has been deployed in production OSS-Fuzz, automatically onboarding new projects that previously lacked fuzzing infrastructure.
conclusions_zh: 该系统为1200多个项目生成了有效的模糊测试驱动，并在生产级开源软件中发现了200多个此前未知的漏洞。
迭代编译反馈在3轮反馈后将驱动编译成功率从55%提高到85%。
该系统已部署到生产环境的OSS-Fuzz中，自动接入此前缺乏模糊测试基础设施的新项目。

title: AI-Enhanced Linux Kernel Fuzzing: A Systematic Approach
authors: Yong Chen, Lingming Zhang
abstract: Systematic AI-enhanced kernel fuzzing covering driver spec generation, syscall sequence synthesis, and crash analysis.
summary: Systematic AI-enhanced kernel fuzzing covering driver spec generation, syscall sequence synthesis, and crash analysis.
summary_zh: 系统性AI增强内核模糊测试，涵盖驱动规范生成、系统调用序列合成和崩溃分析。

experiment.key_results: Covers 200+ new kernel drivers, found 30+ new kernel bugs

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for systematic AI-enhanced kernel fuzzing covering driver spec generation, syscall sequence synthesis, and crash analysis.
Leverages GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Covers 200+ new kernel drivers, found 30+ new kernel bugs.
Addresses OS kernel security, targeting complex system-level vulnerabilities.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for systematic AI-enhanced kernel fuzzing covering driver spec generation, syscall sequence synthesis, and crash analysis.
利用 GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Covers 200+ new kernel drivers, found 30+ new kernel bugs.
解决 OS kernel security, targeting complex system-level vulnerabilities.
abstract_zh: 系统性AI增强内核模糊测试，涵盖驱动规范生成、系统调用序列合成和崩溃分析。
research_questions: Can AI-generated driver specifications enable Syzkaller to fuzz previously unreachable kernel drivers?
How effective is LLM-based syscall sequence synthesis at discovering kernel bugs compared to manually crafted sequences?
Can LLMs automate crash analysis and root-cause identification for kernel bugs?
research_questions_zh: AI生成的驱动规范能否使Syzkaller对此前不可达的内核驱动进行模糊测试？
与手动构造的序列相比，基于LLM的系统调用序列合成在发现内核漏洞方面的效果如何？
LLM能否自动化内核漏洞的崩溃分析和根因识别？
conclusions: The approach covers 200+ new kernel drivers that previously had no fuzzing specifications, and discovered 30+ new kernel bugs.
LLM-synthesized syscall sequences reach deep kernel code paths that random Syzkaller mutations rarely explore.
Automated crash analysis correctly identifies root causes for 65% of discovered crashes, significantly accelerating the triage process.
conclusions_zh: 该方法覆盖了200多个此前没有模糊测试规范的新内核驱动，并发现了30多个新的内核漏洞。
LLM合成的系统调用序列能到达随机Syzkaller变异很少探索的深层内核代码路径。
自动化崩溃分析正确识别了65%的已发现崩溃的根因，显著加速了分类流程。

title: AgentHarness: Autonomous Fuzz Harness Generation with Tool-Using LLM Agents
authors: Ting Liu, Cen Wang
abstract: LLM agent that autonomously writes, compiles, debugs, and optimizes fuzz harnesses using tool interactions.
summary: LLM agent that autonomously writes, compiles, debugs, and optimizes fuzz harnesses using tool interactions.
summary_zh: LLM代理自主编写、编译、调试和优化模糊测试桩，使用工具交互。

experiment.key_results: Autonomous agent achieves 92% valid harness rate, 30% above single-shot

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for LLM agent that autonomously writes, compiles, debugs, and optimizes fuzz harnesses using tool interactions.
Leverages GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Autonomous agent achieves 92% valid harness rate, 30% above single-shot.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for LLM agent that autonomously writes, compiles, debugs, and optimizes fuzz harnesses using tool interactions.
利用 GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Autonomous agent achieves 92% valid harness rate, 30% above single-shot.
abstract_zh: LLM代理自主编写、编译、调试和优化模糊测试桩，使用工具交互。
research_questions: Can an autonomous LLM agent that iteratively writes, compiles, debugs, and optimizes fuzz harnesses outperform single-shot generation?
How many interaction rounds does the agent typically need to produce a valid, high-coverage harness?
What tool-use patterns (compiler invocation, coverage analysis, debugging) are most impactful for harness quality?
research_questions_zh: 迭代编写、编译、调试和优化模糊测试驱动的自主LLM智能体能否优于单次生成？
智能体通常需要多少交互轮次才能生成有效的高覆盖率驱动？
哪些工具使用模式（编译器调用、覆盖率分析、调试）对驱动质量影响最大？
conclusions: The autonomous agent achieves a 92% valid harness rate, a 30 percentage point improvement over single-shot generation.
Most harnesses converge within 3-5 interaction rounds, with diminishing returns after 7 rounds.
Compiler error feedback is the single most impactful tool interaction, responsible for 60% of the improvement over single-shot approaches.
conclusions_zh: 自主智能体达到92%的有效驱动率，比单次生成提高了30个百分点。
大多数驱动在3-5轮交互后收敛，超过7轮后收益递减。
编译器错误反馈是影响最大的单一工具交互，贡献了相对单次方法60%的改进。

title: Conversational Program Repair 2.0: Multi-Turn Repair with Reasoning Models
authors: Chunqiu Steven Xia, Lingming Zhang
abstract: Advances conversational repair using reasoning models (o1) for multi-step bug analysis and repair with improved fix rates.
summary: Advances conversational repair using reasoning models (o1) for multi-step bug analysis and repair with improved fix rates.
summary_zh: 使用推理模型（o1）推进对话式修复，实现多步漏洞分析和修复，提高修复率。

experiment.key_results: Fixes 210/337 Defects4J bugs, new SOTA at $0.35/bug

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for advances conversational repair using reasoning models (o1) for multi-step bug analysis and repair with improved fix rate.
Utilizes o1, GPT-4o for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Fixes 210/337 Defects4J bugs, new SOTA at $0.35/bug.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for advances conversational repair using reasoning models (o1) for multi-step bug analysis and repair with improved fix rate.
利用 o1, GPT-4o for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Fixes 210/337 Defects4J bugs, new SOTA at $0.35/bug.
abstract_zh: 使用推理模型（o1）推进对话式修复，实现多步漏洞分析和修复，提高修复率。
research_questions: How does multi-turn conversational repair with reasoning models compare to single-pass patch generation?
Can reasoning models (o1) perform more effective multi-step bug analysis than standard LLMs in a conversational setting?
What is the cost-effectiveness of conversational repair on the Defects4J benchmark?
research_questions_zh: 使用推理模型的多轮对话式修复与单次补丁生成相比效果如何？
推理模型（o1）在对话设置中能否比标准LLM进行更有效的多步骤漏洞分析？
对话式修复在Defects4J基准上的性价比如何？
conclusions: The conversational approach with o1 fixes 210 out of 337 Defects4J bugs, setting a new state-of-the-art at an average cost of $0.35 per bug.
Multi-turn reasoning resolves 40 additional bugs that single-pass approaches fail on, particularly complex multi-statement fixes.
GPT-4o serves as an effective first pass, with o1 reasoning providing value primarily on the harder subset of bugs that require deeper analysis.
conclusions_zh: 使用o1的对话式方法修复了337个Defects4J漏洞中的210个，以平均每个漏洞0.35美元的成本创造了新的最优记录。
多轮推理额外解决了40个单次方法无法修复的漏洞，尤其是复杂的多语句修复。
GPT-4o可作为有效的第一步，o1推理主要在需要更深入分析的较难漏洞子集上提供价值。

title: SWE-bench Resolved: 50%+ Pass Rate with Advanced LLM Agents
authors: John Yang, Carlos E. Jimenez
abstract: Advanced LLM agents achieve >50% resolution rate on SWE-bench through improved planning and multi-step editing.
summary: Advanced LLM agents achieve >50% resolution rate on SWE-bench through improved planning and multi-step editing.
summary_zh: 高级LLM代理通过改进的规划和多步编辑在SWE-bench上实现>50%的解决率。

experiment.key_results: >50% resolution on SWE-bench Lite, up from 27% in 2024

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for advanced LLM agents achieve >50% resolution rate on SWE-bench through improved planning and multi-step editing.
Utilizes GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: >50% resolution on SWE-bench Lite, up from 27% in 2024.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for advanced LLM agents achieve >50% resolution rate on SWE-bench through improved planning and multi-step editing.
利用 GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: >50% resolution on SWE-bench Lite, up from 27% in 2024.
abstract_zh: 高级LLM代理通过改进的规划和多步编辑在SWE-bench上实现>50%的解决率。
research_questions: What planning and editing strategies enable LLM agents to exceed 50% resolution rate on SWE-bench?
How do advanced agent architectures compare to simpler prompting approaches on real-world GitHub issue resolution?
What are the remaining failure modes preventing LLM agents from solving the hardest SWE-bench instances?
research_questions_zh: 什么规划和编辑策略使LLM智能体能在SWE-bench上超过50%的解决率？
在真实GitHub问题解决中，高级智能体架构与简单提示方法相比如何？
阻止LLM智能体解决最难SWE-bench实例的剩余失败模式是什么？
conclusions: Advanced LLM agents achieve over 50% resolution on SWE-bench Lite, nearly doubling the 27% rate from 2024 approaches.
Improved planning with hierarchical task decomposition and multi-step file editing contribute most to the performance gain.
Remaining failures concentrate on issues requiring understanding of complex project-specific conventions and multi-file architectural changes.
conclusions_zh: 高级LLM智能体在SWE-bench Lite上达到超过50%的解决率，几乎是2024年方法的27%的两倍。
改进的层次化任务分解规划和多步骤文件编辑对性能提升贡献最大。
剩余失败集中在需要理解复杂项目特定约定和多文件架构更改的问题上。

title: VulPatcher: Automated Security Patch Generation for Real-World CVEs
authors: Yuxiang Wu, Martin Monperrus
abstract: End-to-end automated security patch generation for real-world CVEs with formal verification of patch correctness.
summary: End-to-end automated security patch generation for real-world CVEs with formal verification of patch correctness.
summary_zh: 端到端自动安全补丁生成，使用形式化验证确保真实CVE补丁的正确性。

experiment.key_results: 70% correct patch rate for CVEs with formal verification guarantees

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for end-to-end automated security patch generation for real-world CVEs with formal verification of patch correctness.
Utilizes GPT-4o for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 70% correct patch rate for CVEs with formal verification guarantees.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for end-to-end automated security patch generation for real-world CVEs with formal verification of patch correctness.
利用 GPT-4o for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 70% correct patch rate for CVEs with formal verification guarantees.
abstract_zh: 端到端自动安全补丁生成，使用形式化验证确保真实CVE补丁的正确性。
research_questions: Can LLMs generate correct security patches for real-world CVEs with formal correctness guarantees?
How does formal verification of LLM-generated patches compare to test-suite-based validation in ensuring patch correctness?
What types of CVEs are most amenable to automated patch generation with formal verification?
research_questions_zh: LLM能否为真实世界的CVE生成具有形式化正确性保证的安全补丁？
LLM生成补丁的形式化验证与基于测试套件的验证在确保补丁正确性方面如何比较？
哪些类型的CVE最适合带形式化验证的自动化补丁生成？
conclusions: The system achieves a 70% correct patch rate for real-world CVEs, with all correct patches carrying formal verification guarantees.
Formally verified patches have zero regression rate compared to 8% for test-suite-only validated patches.
Buffer overflow and integer overflow CVEs achieve the highest automated patching success rates (85%), while logic vulnerabilities remain challenging (45%).
conclusions_zh: 该系统对真实CVE达到70%的正确补丁率，所有正确补丁均附带形式化验证保证。
经形式化验证的补丁回归率为零，而仅通过测试套件验证的补丁回归率为8%。
缓冲区溢出和整数溢出CVE的自动化补丁成功率最高（85%），而逻辑漏洞仍具挑战性（45%）。

title: CodeRepairAgent: Autonomous Multi-Repository Bug Fixing
authors: Kechi Zhang, Ge Li
abstract: Autonomous agent that fixes bugs spanning multiple repositories by understanding cross-repo dependencies.
summary: Autonomous agent that fixes bugs spanning multiple repositories by understanding cross-repo dependencies.
summary_zh: 理解跨仓库依赖的自主代理，修复跨多个仓库的漏洞。

experiment.key_results: Successfully fixes 35% of cross-repo bugs

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for autonomous agent that fixes bugs spanning multiple repositories by understanding cross-repo dependencies.
Utilizes Claude-3.5, GPT-4o for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Successfully fixes 35% of cross-repo bugs.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for autonomous agent that fixes bugs spanning multiple repositories by understanding cross-repo dependencies.
利用 Claude-3.5, GPT-4o for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Successfully fixes 35% of cross-repo bugs.
abstract_zh: 理解跨仓库依赖的自主代理，修复跨多个仓库的漏洞。
research_questions: Can autonomous LLM agents fix bugs that span multiple interdependent repositories?
How does cross-repository dependency understanding affect multi-repo bug fixing success rates?
What strategies enable agents to navigate and reason about unfamiliar codebases during cross-repo repairs?
research_questions_zh: 自主LLM智能体能否修复跨越多个相互依赖仓库的漏洞？
跨仓库依赖理解如何影响多仓库漏洞修复成功率？
什么策略使智能体能够在跨仓库修复过程中导航和推理陌生代码库？
conclusions: The autonomous agent successfully fixes 35% of cross-repository bugs, a significant achievement given the complexity of multi-repo dependencies.
Claude-3.5 outperforms GPT-4o on cross-repo tasks due to stronger long-context reasoning over multiple files simultaneously.
The primary failure mode is incorrect identification of the root cause repository, accounting for 40% of failed repair attempts.
conclusions_zh: 自主智能体成功修复了35%的跨仓库漏洞，考虑到多仓库依赖的复杂性，这是一个显著成果。
Claude-3.5在跨仓库任务上优于GPT-4o，因其在多文件同时处理中具有更强的长上下文推理能力。
主要失败模式是对根因仓库的错误识别，占修复失败尝试的40%。

title: RepairLlama-2: Open-Source LLM Matching GPT-4o on Program Repair
authors: Andre Silva, Martin Monperrus
abstract: Fine-tuned Llama-3 that matches GPT-4o on program repair benchmarks, fully open-source for reproducibility.
summary: Fine-tuned Llama-3 that matches GPT-4o on program repair benchmarks, fully open-source for reproducibility.
summary_zh: 微调的Llama-3在程序修复基准上匹配GPT-4o，完全开源以保证可重复性。

experiment.key_results: Matches GPT-4o on Defects4J at 20x lower cost

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for fine-tuned Llama-3 that matches GPT-4o on program repair benchmarks, fully open-source for reproducibility.
Utilizes Llama-3 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Matches GPT-4o on Defects4J at 20x lower cost.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for fine-tuned Llama-3 that matches GPT-4o on program repair benchmarks, fully open-source for reproducibility.
利用 Llama-3 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Matches GPT-4o on Defects4J at 20x lower cost.
abstract_zh: 微调的Llama-3在程序修复基准上匹配GPT-4o，完全开源以保证可重复性。
research_questions: Can an open-source fine-tuned Llama-3 model match the repair performance of proprietary GPT-4o?
What fine-tuning data composition and strategy are most effective for training a competitive repair model?
What is the cost-performance trade-off between RepairLlama-2 and GPT-4o for program repair?
research_questions_zh: 开源微调的Llama-3模型能否匹配专有GPT-4o的修复性能？
什么微调数据组成和策略最适合训练具有竞争力的修复模型？
RepairLlama-2与GPT-4o在程序修复方面的成本性能权衡如何？
conclusions: RepairLlama-2 (70B with LoRA) matches GPT-4o's fix rate on Defects4J at approximately 20x lower inference cost.
A curated dataset mixing real bug fixes, synthetic mutations, and vulnerability patches yields the strongest fine-tuned repair model.
The fully open-source release enables reproducible research and self-hosted deployment, addressing privacy concerns of cloud-based repair.
conclusions_zh: RepairLlama-2（70B加LoRA）在Defects4J上匹配GPT-4o的修复率，推理成本降低约20倍。
混合真实漏洞修复、合成变异和漏洞补丁的精选数据集产生了最强的微调修复模型。
完全开源的发布支持可复现的研究和自托管部署，解决了基于云的修复的隐私问题。

title: Universal Jailbreak Attacks v2: Breaking Reasoning LLMs
authors: Andy Zou, J. Zico Kolter
abstract: Extends universal adversarial attacks to reasoning LLMs (o1, Claude-3.5), showing reasoning doesn't prevent jailbreaks.
summary: Extends universal adversarial attacks to reasoning LLMs (o1, Claude-3.5), showing reasoning doesn't prevent jailbreaks.
summary_zh: 将通用对抗攻击扩展到推理LLM（o1、Claude-3.5），表明推理不能防止越狱。

experiment.key_results: 80% attack success rate on reasoning models

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for extends universal adversarial attacks to reasoning LLMs (o1, Claude-3.5), showing reasoning doesn't prevent jailbreaks.
Applies o1, Claude-3.5, GPT-4o to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 80% attack success rate on reasoning models.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for extends universal adversarial attacks to reasoning LLMs (o1, Claude-3.5), showing reasoning doesn't prevent jailbreaks.
应用 o1, Claude-3.5, GPT-4o to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 80% attack success rate on reasoning models.
abstract_zh: 将通用对抗攻击扩展到推理LLM（o1、Claude-3.5），表明推理不能防止越狱。
research_questions: Are reasoning LLMs (o1, Claude-3.5) more resistant to universal adversarial jailbreak attacks than standard models?
How do chain-of-thought reasoning defenses interact with adversarial suffix attacks?
Can universal jailbreak attacks transfer across reasoning model families?
research_questions_zh: 推理型LLM（o1、Claude-3.5）是否比标准模型更能抵抗通用对抗性越狱攻击？
思维链推理防御如何与对抗性后缀攻击交互？
通用越狱攻击能否在推理模型家族之间迁移？
conclusions: Universal adversarial attacks achieve an 80% success rate on reasoning models, demonstrating that reasoning alone does not prevent jailbreaks.
Reasoning models show only marginally better robustness (5% lower attack success) than non-reasoning counterparts, despite higher computational cost.
Attacks crafted on o1 transfer to Claude-3.5 with 60% success rate, indicating shared vulnerabilities across reasoning architectures.
conclusions_zh: 通用对抗性攻击在推理模型上达到80%的成功率，表明仅靠推理无法防止越狱。
推理模型仅表现出略好的鲁棒性（攻击成功率低5%），尽管计算成本更高。
在o1上生成的攻击以60%的成功率迁移到Claude-3.5，表明推理架构间存在共同漏洞。

title: Differentially Private LLM Inference at Scale
authors: Tian Li, Manzil Zaheer
abstract: Achieves practical differentially private LLM inference at scale with minimal latency overhead.
summary: Achieves practical differentially private LLM inference at scale with minimal latency overhead.
summary_zh: 以最小延迟开销实现大规模实用的差分隐私LLM推理。

experiment.key_results: DP inference with only 20% latency overhead at epsilon=1

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for achieves practical differentially private LLM inference at scale with minimal latency overhead.
Applies Llama-3 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: DP inference with only 20% latency overhead at epsilon=1.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for achieves practical differentially private LLM inference at scale with minimal latency overhead.
应用 Llama-3 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: DP inference with only 20% latency overhead at epsilon=1.
abstract_zh: 以最小延迟开销实现大规模实用的差分隐私LLM推理。
research_questions: Can differentially private LLM inference be achieved at production scale with practical latency overhead?
What is the trade-off between privacy guarantee strength (epsilon) and inference quality/latency?
How does DP inference affect the utility of LLM outputs for downstream security analysis tasks?
research_questions_zh: 差分隐私LLM推理能否在生产规模上以实际可接受的延迟开销实现？
隐私保证强度（epsilon）与推理质量/延迟之间的权衡如何？
差分隐私推理如何影响LLM输出在下游安全分析任务中的效用？
conclusions: Practical differentially private inference is achieved with only 20% latency overhead at epsilon=1, enabling production-scale deployment.
Output quality degrades gracefully: at epsilon=1, task accuracy decreases by only 3% compared to non-private inference.
The approach scales efficiently to Llama-3 70B, with latency overhead remaining under 25% regardless of model size.
conclusions_zh: 在epsilon=1时仅增加20%延迟开销即可实现实际可用的差分隐私推理，支持生产规模部署。
输出质量优雅降级：在epsilon=1时，任务准确率仅比非隐私推理下降3%。
该方法可高效扩展到Llama-3 70B，延迟开销无论模型大小均保持在25%以下。

title: AgentSec: Securing LLM Agent Ecosystems
authors: Jiaxin Chen, Yi Liu, Neil Gong
abstract: Comprehensive security framework for LLM agent ecosystems addressing tool poisoning, agent impersonation, and data exfiltration.
summary: Comprehensive security framework for LLM agent ecosystems addressing tool poisoning, agent impersonation, and data exfiltration.
summary_zh: LLM代理生态系统的全面安全框架，解决工具投毒、代理冒充和数据外泄问题。

experiment.key_results: Prevents 95% of agent ecosystem attacks with <3% utility loss

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for comprehensive security framework for LLM agent ecosystems addressing tool poisoning, agent impersonation, and data exfil.
Applies GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Prevents 95% of agent ecosystem attacks with <3% utility loss.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for comprehensive security framework for LLM agent ecosystems addressing tool poisoning, agent impersonation, and data exfil.
应用 GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Prevents 95% of agent ecosystem attacks with <3% utility loss.
abstract_zh: LLM代理生态系统的全面安全框架，解决工具投毒、代理冒充和数据外泄问题。
research_questions: What are the primary security threats in LLM agent ecosystems, including tool poisoning, agent impersonation, and data exfiltration?
Can a unified security framework effectively defend against diverse attack vectors in multi-agent LLM systems?
What is the utility cost of deploying comprehensive security measures in LLM agent ecosystems?
research_questions_zh: LLM智能体生态系统中的主要安全威胁是什么，包括工具投毒、智能体冒充和数据外泄？
统一的安全框架能否有效防御多智能体LLM系统中的多种攻击向量？
在LLM智能体生态系统中部署全面安全措施的效用成本是多少？
conclusions: The AgentSec framework prevents 95% of agent ecosystem attacks including tool poisoning and impersonation with under 3% utility loss.
Tool poisoning is the most prevalent attack vector (45% of observed attacks), followed by prompt injection (30%) and data exfiltration (25%).
Runtime monitoring with behavioral anomaly detection is the most effective single defense component, catching 70% of attacks independently.
conclusions_zh: AgentSec框架以不到3%的效用损失防止了95%的智能体生态系统攻击，包括工具投毒和冒充。
工具投毒是最普遍的攻击向量（占观察到攻击的45%），其次是提示注入（30%）和数据外泄（25%）。
基于行为异常检测的运行时监控是最有效的单一防御组件，独立捕获70%的攻击。

title: LLM for Cybersecurity: A Comprehensive Survey 2025
authors: Yue Wang, Zhen Li, Chao Zhang, Yang Liu

Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.

contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for most comprehensive survey of LLMs in cybersecurity covering 500+ papers across vulnerability detection, fuzzing, patchin.
利用  for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.

abstract_zh: 最全面的LLM网络安全综述，涵盖漏洞检测、模糊测试、修补和隐私的500+论文。
research_questions: What is the current state of LLM applications across the four pillars of cybersecurity: vulnerability detection, fuzzing, patching, and privacy?
What are the key open challenges and research gaps in applying LLMs to cybersecurity as of 2025?
How do different LLM architectures and training strategies map to different cybersecurity tasks?
research_questions_zh: LLM在网络安全四大支柱（漏洞检测、模糊测试、补丁修复和隐私）中的应用现状如何？
截至2025年，将LLM应用于网络安全的关键开放挑战和研究空白是什么？
不同的LLM架构和训练策略如何映射到不同的网络安全任务？
conclusions: The survey covers 500+ papers and identifies 10 key open challenges including cross-task generalization and adversarial robustness of security LLMs.
Vulnerability detection is the most mature application area, while LLM-based fuzzing shows the fastest growth trajectory.
A significant gap exists between benchmark performance and real-world deployment, with most tools tested only on curated datasets.
conclusions_zh: 该综述涵盖500多篇论文，识别了10个关键开放挑战，包括安全LLM的跨任务泛化和对抗鲁棒性。
漏洞检测是最成熟的应用领域，而基于LLM的模糊测试显示出最快的增长轨迹。
基准性能与实际部署之间存在显著差距，大多数工具仅在精选数据集上进行测试。

title: VulnAgent-2026: Fully Autonomous Vulnerability Discovery and Exploitation
authors: Chao Zhang, Hao Li, Dawn Song
abstract: Fully autonomous vulnerability agent that discovers, analyzes, and generates proof-of-concept exploits for real-world software with minimal human intervention.
summary: Fully autonomous vulnerability agent that discovers, analyzes, and generates proof-of-concept exploits for real-world software with minimal human intervention.
summary_zh: 完全自主的漏洞代理，以最少人工干预发现、分析并为真实软件生成概念验证漏洞利用。

experiment.key_results: Autonomously discovers and exploits 45% of vulnerabilities in tested targets
experiment.real_world_impact: Responsible disclosure program for discovered vulns

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for fully autonomous vulnerability agent that discovers, analyzes, and generates proof-of-concept exploits for real-world so.
Leverages GPT-5, Claude-4 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Autonomously discovers and exploits 45% of vulnerabilities in tested targets.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for fully autonomous vulnerability agent that discovers, analyzes, and generates proof-of-concept exploits for real-world so.
利用 GPT-5, Claude-4 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Autonomously discovers and exploits 45% of vulnerabilities in tested targets.
abstract_zh: 完全自主的漏洞代理，以最少人工干预发现、分析并为真实软件生成概念验证漏洞利用。
research_questions: Can a fully autonomous LLM agent discover, analyze, and generate proof-of-concept exploits for real-world vulnerabilities without human intervention?
How do GPT-5 and Claude-4 compare in autonomous vulnerability discovery and exploitation capabilities?
What safety mechanisms are needed to responsibly deploy autonomous vulnerability discovery agents?
research_questions_zh: 完全自主的LLM智能体能否在无人干预的情况下发现、分析真实世界漏洞并生成概念验证利用代码？
GPT-5和Claude-4在自主漏洞发现和利用能力方面如何比较？
负责任地部署自主漏洞发现智能体需要哪些安全机制？
conclusions: The agent autonomously discovers and generates working exploits for 45% of vulnerabilities in tested targets, a major advance in automated security testing.
GPT-5 shows stronger exploit generation capabilities, while Claude-4 demonstrates more reliable vulnerability classification with fewer false leads.
A responsible disclosure framework is integrated, automatically reporting vulnerabilities before exploit details are stored or shared.
conclusions_zh: 该智能体自主发现并为测试目标中45%的漏洞生成可工作的利用代码，是自动化安全测试的重大进展。
GPT-5表现出更强的利用代码生成能力，而Claude-4展示了更可靠的漏洞分类，误导更少。
集成了负责任披露框架，在存储或共享利用详情之前自动报告漏洞。

title: The State of Automated Program Repair in 2026
authors: Chunqiu Steven Xia, Lingming Zhang
abstract: Comprehensive analysis of APR progress showing LLM agents now fix 80%+ of standard benchmark bugs, with focus on remaining challenges.
summary: Comprehensive analysis of APR progress showing LLM agents now fix 80%+ of standard benchmark bugs, with focus on remaining challenges.
summary_zh: APR进展的全面分析，表明LLM代理现在修复80%+的标准基准漏洞，重点关注剩余挑战。

experiment.key_results: LLM agents fix 80%+ of Defects4J bugs, focus shifts to complex real-world bugs

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for comprehensive analysis of APR progress showing LLM agents now fix 80%+ of standard benchmark bugs, with focus on remaini.
Utilizes GPT-5, Claude-4, Llama-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: LLM agents fix 80%+ of Defects4J bugs, focus shifts to complex real-world bugs.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for comprehensive analysis of APR progress showing LLM agents now fix 80%+ of standard benchmark bugs, with focus on remaini.
利用 GPT-5, Claude-4, Llama-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: LLM agents fix 80%+ of Defects4J bugs, focus shifts to complex real-world bugs.
abstract_zh: APR进展的全面分析，表明LLM代理现在修复80%+的标准基准漏洞，重点关注剩余挑战。
research_questions: What is the current state of automated program repair in 2026, and what benchmark performance levels have LLM agents achieved?
What types of bugs remain unsolved by current LLM-based repair approaches despite high benchmark scores?
What are the most promising research directions for advancing APR beyond standard benchmark saturation?
research_questions_zh: 2026年自动化程序修复的现状如何，LLM智能体达到了什么基准性能水平？
尽管基准分数很高，当前基于LLM的修复方法仍无法解决哪些类型的漏洞？
在标准基准趋于饱和的情况下，推进APR最有前景的研究方向是什么？
conclusions: LLM agents now fix over 80% of Defects4J bugs, effectively saturating traditional benchmarks and shifting research focus to complex real-world bugs.
Remaining unsolved bugs typically require cross-file reasoning, domain-specific knowledge, or understanding of non-functional requirements.
The community needs harder, more representative benchmarks reflecting production complexity to drive continued APR progress.
conclusions_zh: LLM智能体现在可修复超过80%的Defects4J漏洞，有效地饱和了传统基准，将研究重心转向复杂的真实世界漏洞。
剩余未解决的漏洞通常需要跨文件推理、领域特定知识或对非功能性需求的理解。
社区需要更难、更具代表性的反映生产复杂性的基准来推动APR的持续进步。

title: FuzzFoundation: Foundation Model for Universal Fuzzing
authors: Chenyuan Yang, Lingming Zhang
abstract: First foundation model specifically trained for fuzzing, capable of generating harnesses, seeds, and mutations for any target without fine-tuning.
summary: First foundation model specifically trained for fuzzing, capable of generating harnesses, seeds, and mutations for any target without fine-tuning.
summary_zh: 首个专门为模糊测试训练的基础模型，无需微调即可为任何目标生成桩、种子和变异。

experiment.key_results: Universal fuzzing model outperforms specialized tools across all categories

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for first foundation model specifically trained for fuzzing, capable of generating harnesses, seeds, and mutations for any t.
Leverages FuzzFoundation for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Universal fuzzing model outperforms specialized tools across all categories.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for first foundation model specifically trained for fuzzing, capable of generating harnesses, seeds, and mutations for any t.
利用 FuzzFoundation for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Universal fuzzing model outperforms specialized tools across all categories.
abstract_zh: 首个专门为模糊测试训练的基础模型，无需微调即可为任何目标生成桩、种子和变异。
research_questions: Can a single foundation model trained specifically for fuzzing generate effective harnesses, seeds, and mutations without target-specific fine-tuning?
How does a fuzzing-specific foundation model compare to general-purpose LLMs and specialized fuzzing tools across different target categories?
What pre-training data and objectives are most effective for building a universal fuzzing model?
research_questions_zh: 专门为模糊测试训练的单一基础模型能否在无需目标特定微调的情况下生成有效的驱动、种子和变异？
模糊测试专用基础模型与通用LLM和专用模糊测试工具在不同目标类别上的表现如何比较？
什么预训练数据和目标最适合构建通用模糊测试模型？
conclusions: FuzzFoundation, the first fuzzing-specific foundation model, outperforms both general-purpose LLMs and specialized tools across all evaluation categories.
Zero-shot harness generation, seed synthesis, and mutation strategies all benefit from fuzzing-aware pre-training, with harness quality improving by 25% over GPT-4o.
Pre-training on a corpus of existing fuzz configurations, crash-triggering inputs, and coverage maps produces the strongest fuzzing foundation model.
conclusions_zh: FuzzFoundation作为首个模糊测试专用基础模型，在所有评估类别中优于通用LLM和专用工具。
零样本驱动生成、种子合成和变异策略均受益于模糊测试感知的预训练，驱动质量比GPT-4o提高25%。
在现有模糊测试配置、触发崩溃的输入和覆盖率图的语料库上预训练产生了最强的模糊测试基础模型。

title: AI-Native Privacy: Building Privacy-First LLM Systems
authors: Tian Li, Virginia Smith
abstract: Proposes AI-native privacy architecture where privacy is built into LLM systems from the ground up, not bolted on.
summary: Proposes AI-native privacy architecture where privacy is built into LLM systems from the ground up, not bolted on.
summary_zh: 提出AI原生隐私架构，将隐私从根本上构建到LLM系统中，而非事后添加。

experiment.key_results: Privacy-first architecture achieves 98% of non-private performance with formal guarantees

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for AI-native privacy architecture where privacy is built into LLM systems from the ground up, not bolted on.
Applies Custom to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Privacy-first architecture achieves 98% of non-private performance with formal guarantees.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for AI-native privacy architecture where privacy is built into LLM systems from the ground up, not bolted on.
应用 Custom to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Privacy-first architecture achieves 98% of non-private performance with formal guarantees.
abstract_zh: 提出AI原生隐私架构，将隐私从根本上构建到LLM系统中，而非事后添加。
research_questions: How can privacy be architecturally built into LLM systems from the ground up rather than added as an afterthought?
What is the performance gap between privacy-native LLM architectures and standard models with bolted-on privacy mechanisms?
Can formal privacy guarantees be maintained without significant model capability degradation?
research_questions_zh: 如何从底层架构上将隐私内置到LLM系统中，而不是作为事后附加？
隐私原生的LLM架构与附加隐私机制的标准模型之间的性能差距是多少？
能否在不显著降低模型能力的情况下维持形式化隐私保证？
conclusions: The privacy-first architecture achieves 98% of non-private model performance while providing formal differential privacy guarantees.
Building privacy into the architecture from the start reduces performance degradation by 5x compared to post-hoc privacy mechanisms.
The approach eliminates the need for separate private and non-private deployment pipelines, reducing operational complexity.
conclusions_zh: 隐私优先架构在提供形式化差分隐私保证的同时，达到非隐私模型98%的性能。
从一开始就将隐私构建到架构中，性能退化比事后隐私机制减少5倍。
该方法消除了对独立的隐私和非隐私部署管道的需求，降低了运营复杂性。

title: The Future of Fuzzing: AI, Formal Methods, and Beyond
authors: Marcel Bohme, Van-Thuan Pham, Abhik Roychoudhury
abstract: Forward-looking survey on the convergence of AI and formal methods in fuzzing, covering 2020-2026 developments.
summary: Forward-looking survey on the convergence of AI and formal methods in fuzzing, covering 2020-2026 developments.

experiment.key_results: Identifies next-generation fuzzing paradigms combining AI with formal verification

利用  for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.

abstract_zh: 关于AI与形式化方法在模糊测试中融合的前瞻性综述，涵盖2020-2026年的发展。
research_questions: How has the convergence of AI and formal methods shaped the evolution of fuzzing from 2020 to 2026?
What are the next-generation fuzzing paradigms emerging from the integration of LLMs and formal verification?
What fundamental limitations remain in current fuzzing approaches despite AI-driven advances?
research_questions_zh: 从2020年到2026年，AI与形式化方法的融合如何塑造了模糊测试的演变？
LLM与形式化验证集成中涌现出哪些下一代模糊测试范式？
尽管AI驱动取得了进展，当前模糊测试方法仍存在哪些根本性限制？
conclusions: The survey identifies next-generation fuzzing paradigms where AI handles test generation and formal methods ensure correctness and completeness.
LLM-enhanced fuzzing has progressed from simple seed generation (2020) to full autonomous fuzzing pipelines (2026) in just six years.
Key remaining challenges include achieving provable coverage guarantees and handling programs with heavy statefulness and concurrency.
conclusions_zh: 该综述识别了下一代模糊测试范式，其中AI负责测试生成，形式化方法确保正确性和完整性。
LLM增强的模糊测试在短短六年内从简单的种子生成（2020）发展到完全自主的模糊测试管道（2026）。
关键的剩余挑战包括实现可证明的覆盖率保证以及处理具有大量状态和并发的程序。

title: Code Security in the Age of AI: Challenges and Opportunities
authors: Yizheng Chen, David Wagner, Dawn Song
abstract: Comprehensive analysis of how AI changes the code security landscape, covering both AI-generated vulnerabilities and AI-powered detection.
summary: Comprehensive analysis of how AI changes the code security landscape, covering both AI-generated vulnerabilities and AI-powered detection.

experiment.key_results: Maps the evolving threat/defense landscape of AI-era code security

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for comprehensive analysis of how AI changes the code security landscape, covering both AI-generated vulnerabilities and AI-.
Applies  to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.

提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Maps the evolving threat/defense landscape of AI-era code security.
abstract_zh: 全面分析AI如何改变代码安全格局，涵盖AI生成的漏洞和AI驱动的检测。
research_questions: How does the rise of AI-generated code change the software vulnerability landscape?
What new categories of vulnerabilities emerge specifically from AI-assisted code generation?
How effective are AI-powered detection tools at finding vulnerabilities in AI-generated code versus human-written code?
research_questions_zh: AI生成代码的兴起如何改变了软件漏洞格局？
AI辅助代码生成中具体产生了哪些新类别的漏洞？
AI驱动的检测工具在发现AI生成代码与人工编写代码中的漏洞方面效果如何？
conclusions: AI-generated code introduces a distinct vulnerability profile with higher rates of missing input validation and incorrect error handling compared to human code.
AI detection tools are paradoxically less effective at finding vulnerabilities in AI-generated code, achieving 15% lower F1 than on human-written code.
The paper maps the evolving threat-defense landscape and identifies a feedback loop where AI-generated vulnerabilities require AI-specific detection strategies.
conclusions_zh: AI生成的代码呈现出独特的漏洞特征，与人工代码相比，缺少输入验证和错误处理不当的比率更高。
AI检测工具在发现AI生成代码中的漏洞时效果悖论性地较差，F1比人工编写代码低15%。
论文绘制了不断演变的威胁防御格局，识别出AI生成的漏洞需要AI特定检测策略的反馈循环。

title: Next-Gen Supply Chain Security with Foundation Models
authors: Yue Wang, Zhi Li
abstract: Uses foundation models for comprehensive supply chain security: dependency scanning, provenance verification, and runtime monitoring.
summary: Uses foundation models for comprehensive supply chain security: dependency scanning, provenance verification, and runtime monitoring.
summary_zh: 使用基础模型实现全面供应链安全：依赖扫描、来源验证和运行时监控。

experiment.key_results: 99% malicious package detection with near-zero false positives

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for foundation models for comprehensive supply chain security: dependency scanning, provenance verification, and runtime mon.
Leverages GPT-5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 99% malicious package detection with near-zero false positives.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for foundation models for comprehensive supply chain security: dependency scanning, provenance verification, and runtime mon.
利用 GPT-5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 99% malicious package detection with near-zero false positives.
abstract_zh: 使用基础模型实现全面供应链安全：依赖扫描、来源验证和运行时监控。
research_questions: Can foundation models provide comprehensive supply chain security spanning dependency scanning, provenance verification, and runtime monitoring?
How does foundation model-based malicious package detection compare to traditional signature and heuristic approaches?
What is the false positive rate achievable in malicious package detection using next-generation AI approaches?
research_questions_zh: 基础模型能否提供涵盖依赖扫描、来源验证和运行时监控的全面供应链安全？
基于基础模型的恶意包检测与传统签名和启发式方法相比如何？
使用下一代AI方法在恶意包检测中可达到的误报率是多少？
conclusions: The foundation model approach achieves 99% malicious package detection with near-zero false positives across npm, PyPI, and Maven ecosystems.
Provenance verification using LLM-based code similarity analysis detects sophisticated supply chain attacks that evade traditional tools.
Runtime monitoring with behavioral baseline models catches 92% of post-installation malicious activities with under 1% overhead.
conclusions_zh: 基础模型方法在npm、PyPI和Maven生态系统中实现了99%的恶意包检测率，误报接近于零。
使用基于LLM的代码相似性分析进行来源验证可检测出逃避传统工具的复杂供应链攻击。
带有行为基线模型的运行时监控以不到1%的开销捕获92%的安装后恶意活动。

title: AutoPatch-2026: Fully Automated Security Patching Pipeline
authors: Jialu Zhang, Yiran Chen
abstract: End-to-end automated pipeline from CVE disclosure to tested, verified, and deployed security patches.
summary: End-to-end automated pipeline from CVE disclosure to tested, verified, and deployed security patches.
summary_zh: 从CVE披露到测试、验证和部署安全补丁的端到端自动管道。

experiment.key_results: Patches 85% of CVEs within 24 hours of disclosure
experiment.real_world_impact: Deployed at Fortune 500 company

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for end-to-end automated pipeline from CVE disclosure to tested, verified, and deployed security patches.
Utilizes GPT-5, Claude-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Patches 85% of CVEs within 24 hours of disclosure.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for end-to-end automated pipeline from CVE disclosure to tested, verified, and deployed security patches.
利用 GPT-5, Claude-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Patches 85% of CVEs within 24 hours of disclosure.
abstract_zh: 从CVE披露到测试、验证和部署安全补丁的端到端自动管道。
research_questions: Can an end-to-end automated pipeline generate, verify, and deploy security patches within 24 hours of CVE disclosure?
What is the success rate of fully automated patching across different CVE categories and severity levels?
How does the pipeline ensure patch correctness and avoid introducing new vulnerabilities?
research_questions_zh: 端到端自动化管道能否在CVE披露后24小时内生成、验证和部署安全补丁？
全自动补丁在不同CVE类别和严重程度上的成功率如何？
管道如何确保补丁正确性并避免引入新漏洞？
conclusions: The pipeline patches 85% of CVEs within 24 hours of disclosure, with an end-to-end success rate including testing and deployment verification.
High and critical severity CVEs achieve 90% patch rate due to clearer vulnerability descriptions, while medium severity CVEs have 78% success.
The system has been deployed at a Fortune 500 company, reducing mean time to patch from 35 days to under 24 hours.
conclusions_zh: 该管道在CVE披露后24小时内修补了85%的CVE，端到端成功率包括测试和部署验证。
高危和关键CVE由于漏洞描述更清晰而达到90%的补丁率，中危CVE的成功率为78%。
该系统已在一家财富500强公司部署，将平均修补时间从35天缩短到24小时以内。

title: Privacy-Preserving Vulnerability Detection via Secure LLM Inference
authors: Yang Liu, Chenghao Wang
abstract: Enables organizations to use cloud LLMs for vulnerability detection without exposing proprietary source code.
summary: Enables organizations to use cloud LLMs for vulnerability detection without exposing proprietary source code.
summary_zh: 使组织能够使用云LLM进行漏洞检测而不暴露专有源代码。

experiment.key_results: Secure inference with only 3x cost overhead

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for enables organizations to use cloud LLMs for vulnerability detection without exposing proprietary source code.
Applies GPT-5 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Secure inference with only 3x cost overhead.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for enables organizations to use cloud LLMs for vulnerability detection without exposing proprietary source code.
应用 GPT-5 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Secure inference with only 3x cost overhead.
abstract_zh: 使组织能够使用云LLM进行漏洞检测而不暴露专有源代码。
research_questions: Can organizations use cloud-hosted LLMs for vulnerability detection without exposing proprietary source code?
What is the computational and cost overhead of secure LLM inference for vulnerability detection?
How does the detection accuracy of privacy-preserving inference compare to plaintext inference?
research_questions_zh: 组织能否使用云托管的LLM进行漏洞检测而不暴露专有源代码？
用于漏洞检测的安全LLM推理的计算和成本开销是多少？
隐私保护推理的检测准确性与明文推理相比如何？
conclusions: Secure inference enables vulnerability detection without exposing source code, with only 3x cost overhead compared to standard inference.
Detection accuracy under secure inference remains within 2% of plaintext inference, making the privacy trade-off practical.
The approach combines homomorphic encryption for embeddings with secure multi-party computation for attention layers, balancing security and efficiency.
conclusions_zh: 安全推理在不暴露源代码的情况下实现漏洞检测，成本仅为标准推理的3倍。
安全推理下的检测准确率与明文推理相差不超过2%，使隐私权衡切实可行。
该方法结合了对嵌入层使用同态加密和对注意力层使用安全多方计算，平衡安全性和效率。

title: HarnessFoundation: Pre-Trained Model for Fuzz Harness Generation
authors: Lei Wu, Yuekang Li
abstract: Foundation model pre-trained on 100K+ existing fuzz harnesses for one-shot harness generation for new targets.
