experiment.key_results: One-shot harness generation with 95% compilation rate

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for foundation model pre-trained on 100K+ existing fuzz harnesses for one-shot harness generation for new targets.
Leverages HarnessFoundation for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: One-shot harness generation with 95% compilation rate.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for foundation model pre-trained on 100K+ existing fuzz harnesses for one-shot harness generation for new targets.
利用 HarnessFoundation for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: One-shot harness generation with 95% compilation rate.
abstract_zh: 在10万+现有模糊测试桩上预训练的基础模型，用于新目标的单次桩生成。
research_questions: Can a foundation model pre-trained on 100K+ existing fuzz harnesses enable one-shot harness generation for new targets?
How does a harness-specific pre-trained model compare to general-purpose LLMs in compilation success rate and code coverage?
What harness patterns and structures does the model learn from large-scale pre-training?
research_questions_zh: 在10万+现有模糊测试驱动上预训练的基础模型能否实现对新目标的一次性驱动生成？
驱动专用预训练模型与通用LLM在编译成功率和代码覆盖率方面如何比较？
模型从大规模预训练中学习了哪些驱动模式和结构？
conclusions: HarnessFoundation achieves a 95% compilation rate for one-shot harness generation, substantially outperforming GPT-4o's 82% rate.
Pre-training on 100K+ real harnesses enables the model to learn common initialization patterns, teardown sequences, and API usage conventions.
Generated harnesses achieve 85% of the code coverage of expert-written harnesses on average, with 40% of targets exceeding human-written coverage.
conclusions_zh: HarnessFoundation的一次性驱动生成编译率达到95%，大幅超越GPT-4o的82%。
在10万+真实驱动上预训练使模型能学习常见的初始化模式、清理序列和API使用约定。
生成的驱动平均达到专家编写驱动85%的代码覆盖率，40%的目标超过人工编写的覆盖率。

title: BinaryGPT: Binary Code Understanding with Large Language Models
authors: Sungjae Park, Byoungyoung Lee
abstract: Uses LLMs for binary code understanding including vulnerability detection, function identification, and decompilation enhancement.
summary: Uses LLMs for binary code understanding including vulnerability detection, function identification, and decompilation enhancement.
summary_zh: 使用LLM进行二进制代码理解，包括漏洞检测、函数识别和反编译增强。
abstract_zh: 使用LLM进行二进制代码理解，包括漏洞检测、函数识别和反编译增强。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for LLMs for binary code understanding including vulnerability detection, function identification, and decompilation enhance.
Leverages GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 82% accuracy on binary vulnerability detection.
Handles binary-level analysis without requiring source code availability.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for LLMs for binary code understanding including vulnerability detection, function identification, and decompilation enhance.
利用 GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 82% accuracy on binary vulnerability detection.
处理 binary-level analysis without requiring source code availability.

experiment.key_results: 82% accuracy on binary vulnerability detection

research_questions: How effectively can LLMs understand and analyze binary code for vulnerability detection without source code access?
Can LLMs improve decompilation quality to aid binary vulnerability analysis?
What representation of binary code (raw bytes, disassembly, decompiled C) is most effective for LLM-based analysis?
research_questions_zh: 在没有源代码访问的情况下，LLM能多有效地理解和分析二进制代码以进行漏洞检测？
LLM能否提高反编译质量以辅助二进制漏洞分析？
哪种二进制代码表示（原始字节、反汇编、反编译C代码）对基于LLM的分析最有效？
conclusions: BinaryGPT achieves 82% accuracy on binary vulnerability detection, demonstrating that LLMs can effectively reason about compiled code.
LLM-enhanced decompilation produces more readable and semantically accurate output, improving downstream vulnerability analysis by 20%.
Decompiled pseudo-C representation provides the best input format for LLM analysis, outperforming raw disassembly by 15% in detection accuracy.
conclusions_zh: BinaryGPT在二进制漏洞检测上达到82%的准确率，表明LLM能有效推理编译后的代码。
LLM增强的反编译产生更可读和语义更准确的输出，将下游漏洞分析改善了20%。
反编译伪C代码表示为LLM分析提供了最佳输入格式，在检测准确性上比原始反汇编高15%。

title: Android Security Analysis with Multimodal LLMs
authors: Dongkwan Kim, Byoungyoung Lee
abstract: Uses multimodal LLMs to analyze Android apps combining code analysis, UI screenshots, and manifest inspection.
summary: Uses multimodal LLMs to analyze Android apps combining code analysis, UI screenshots, and manifest inspection.
summary_zh: 使用多模态LLM结合代码分析、UI截图和清单检查分析Android应用。
abstract_zh: 使用多模态LLM结合代码分析、UI截图和清单检查分析Android应用。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for multimodal LLMs to analyze Android apps combining code analysis, UI screenshots, and manifest inspection.
Leverages GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Detects 85% of Android vulnerabilities with visual UI analysis.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for multimodal LLMs to analyze Android apps combining code analysis, UI screenshots, and manifest inspection.
利用 GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Detects 85% of Android vulnerabilities with visual UI analysis.

experiment.key_results: Detects 85% of Android vulnerabilities with visual UI analysis

research_questions: Can multimodal LLMs combining code analysis, UI screenshots, and manifest inspection improve Android security analysis?
How does visual UI analysis contribute to detecting Android vulnerabilities beyond traditional code-only approaches?
What types of Android vulnerabilities benefit most from multimodal analysis?
research_questions_zh: 结合代码分析、UI截图和清单检查的多模态LLM能否改善Android安全分析？
视觉UI分析如何在传统纯代码方法之外贡献于Android漏洞检测？
哪些类型的Android漏洞从多模态分析中受益最多？
conclusions: The multimodal approach detects 85% of Android vulnerabilities, with visual UI analysis contributing a unique 12% improvement over code-only methods.
UI-related vulnerabilities such as tapjacking, phishing overlays, and permission dialog spoofing are most effectively detected through visual analysis.
Manifest inspection combined with LLM reasoning catches over-privileged permission requests that code analysis alone misses in 30% of cases.
conclusions_zh: 多模态方法检测到85%的Android漏洞，视觉UI分析比纯代码方法独立贡献了12%的改进。
与UI相关的漏洞如点击劫持、钓鱼覆盖和权限对话框欺骗通过视觉分析最有效地被检测。
清单检查结合LLM推理可捕获30%纯代码分析遗漏的过度权限请求。

title: CloudVuln: Detecting Cloud Infrastructure Vulnerabilities with LLMs
authors: Sen Wu, Peng Wang
abstract: Detects cloud infrastructure vulnerabilities across AWS, Azure, GCP using LLMs to analyze IaC and runtime configurations.
summary: Detects cloud infrastructure vulnerabilities across AWS, Azure, GCP using LLMs to analyze IaC and runtime configurations.
summary_zh: 使用LLM分析IaC和运行时配置检测AWS、Azure、GCP的云基础设施漏洞。
abstract_zh: 使用LLM分析IaC和运行时配置检测AWS、Azure、GCP的云基础设施漏洞。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for detects cloud infrastructure vulnerabilities across AWS, Azure, GCP using LLMs to analyze IaC and runtime configurations.
Leverages GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Finds 40% more cloud misconfigs than Checkov.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for detects cloud infrastructure vulnerabilities across AWS, Azure, GCP using LLMs to analyze IaC and runtime configurations.
利用 GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Finds 40% more cloud misconfigs than Checkov.

experiment.key_results: Finds 40% more cloud misconfigs than Checkov

research_questions: Can LLMs detect cloud infrastructure vulnerabilities by analyzing Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) templates and runtime configurations?
How does LLM-based cloud misconfiguration detection compare to established tools like Checkov?
What categories of cloud misconfigurations are best detected by LLM-based versus rule-based approaches?
research_questions_zh: LLM能否通过分析基础设施即代码（IaC）模板和运行时配置来检测云基础设施漏洞？
基于LLM的云错误配置检测与Checkov等成熟工具相比如何？
LLM方法与基于规则方法各自最擅长检测哪些类别的云错误配置？
conclusions: CloudVuln finds 40% more cloud misconfigurations than Checkov across AWS, Azure, and GCP environments.
LLM-based detection excels at identifying context-dependent misconfigurations where security depends on the interaction between multiple settings.
GPT-4o shows stronger performance on AWS and GCP configurations, while Claude-3.5 performs better on Azure due to its training data distribution.
conclusions_zh: CloudVuln在AWS、Azure和GCP环境中比Checkov多发现40%的云错误配置。
基于LLM的检测擅长识别上下文相关的错误配置，其中安全性取决于多个设置之间的交互。
GPT-4o在AWS和GCP配置上表现更强，而Claude-3.5由于训练数据分布在Azure上表现更好。

title: EmbedVuln: Vulnerability Detection via Code Embeddings from LLMs
authors: Junhao Li, Xin He
abstract: Uses LLM-generated code embeddings as features for efficient vulnerability classification with lightweight models.
summary: Uses LLM-generated code embeddings as features for efficient vulnerability classification with lightweight models.
summary_zh: 使用LLM生成的代码嵌入作为特征，用轻量级模型进行高效漏洞分类。
abstract_zh: 使用LLM生成的代码嵌入作为特征，用轻量级模型进行高效漏洞分类。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for LLM-generated code embeddings as features for efficient vulnerability classification with lightweight models.
Leverages CodeLlama for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Embedding-based approach 100x faster than LLM inference with 90% accuracy.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for LLM-generated code embeddings as features for efficient vulnerability classification with lightweight models.
利用 CodeLlama for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Embedding-based approach 100x faster than LLM inference with 90% accuracy.

experiment.key_results: Embedding-based approach 100x faster than LLM inference with 90% accuracy

research_questions: Can LLM-generated code embeddings serve as effective features for lightweight vulnerability classification without full LLM inference?
What is the speed-accuracy trade-off between embedding-based classification and direct LLM vulnerability detection?
Which LLM embedding layers capture the most informative vulnerability-related features?
research_questions_zh: LLM生成的代码嵌入能否作为轻量级漏洞分类的有效特征，而无需完整的LLM推理？
基于嵌入的分类与直接LLM漏洞检测之间的速度-准确性权衡如何？
哪些LLM嵌入层捕获了最具信息量的漏洞相关特征？
conclusions: The embedding-based approach is 100x faster than full LLM inference while maintaining 90% of the detection accuracy.
CodeLlama's intermediate layers (layers 16-24 of 32) produce the most discriminative vulnerability embeddings.
A simple random forest classifier on LLM embeddings outperforms traditional code metrics-based vulnerability predictors by 25% F1.
conclusions_zh: 基于嵌入的方法比完整LLM推理快100倍，同时保持90%的检测准确率。
CodeLlama的中间层（32层中的第16-24层）产生最具判别力的漏洞嵌入。
基于LLM嵌入的简单随机森林分类器在F1上比传统基于代码度量的漏洞预测器高出25%。

title: APISec: LLM-Powered API Security Testing Framework
authors: Ziyang Wang, Hao Li
abstract: Comprehensive API security testing framework using LLMs to understand API specs and generate security tests.
summary: Comprehensive API security testing framework using LLMs to understand API specs and generate security tests.
summary_zh: 使用LLM理解API规范并生成安全测试的全面API安全测试框架。
abstract_zh: 使用LLM理解API规范并生成安全测试的全面API安全测试框架。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for comprehensive API security testing framework using LLMs to understand API specs and generate security tests.
Leverages GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Finds 3x more API vulnerabilities than traditional tools.
Addresses auth-bypass, injection, rate-limit vulnerability types, expanding coverage of security analysis.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for comprehensive API security testing framework using LLMs to understand API specs and generate security tests.
利用 GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Finds 3x more API vulnerabilities than traditional tools.
解决 auth-bypass, injection, rate-limit vulnerability types, expanding coverage of security analysis.

experiment.key_results: Finds 3x more API vulnerabilities than traditional tools

research_questions: Can LLMs understand API specifications to automatically generate comprehensive security test cases?
How does LLM-powered API security testing compare to traditional DAST tools in vulnerability discovery?
What types of API vulnerabilities (authentication bypass, injection, rate limiting) are most effectively found by LLM-based testing?
research_questions_zh: LLM能否理解API规范以自动生成全面的安全测试用例？
LLM驱动的API安全测试与传统DAST工具在漏洞发现方面如何比较？
哪些类型的API漏洞（认证绕过、注入、速率限制）最能被基于LLM的测试有效发现？
conclusions: APISec finds 3x more API vulnerabilities than traditional DAST tools by leveraging LLM understanding of API semantics and business logic.
Authentication bypass and authorization flaws are the vulnerability categories where LLM-based testing shows the largest advantage over traditional tools.
LLM-generated test cases cover complex multi-step attack sequences that rule-based tools cannot express, catching 45% more logic vulnerabilities.
conclusions_zh: APISec通过利用LLM对API语义和业务逻辑的理解，比传统DAST工具多发现3倍的API漏洞。
认证绕过和授权缺陷是基于LLM的测试相比传统工具优势最大的漏洞类别。
LLM生成的测试用例覆盖了基于规则的工具无法表达的复杂多步攻击序列，多捕获45%的逻辑漏洞。

title: WasmVuln: Detecting Vulnerabilities in WebAssembly Binaries
authors: Guang Chen, Kexin Pei
abstract: First LLM-based approach for WebAssembly vulnerability detection, handling Wasm's stack-based architecture.
summary: First LLM-based approach for WebAssembly vulnerability detection, handling Wasm's stack-based architecture.
summary_zh: 首个基于LLM的WebAssembly漏洞检测方法，处理Wasm的基于栈的架构。
abstract_zh: 首个基于LLM的WebAssembly漏洞检测方法，处理Wasm的基于栈的架构。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for first LLM-based approach for WebAssembly vulnerability detection, handling Wasm's stack-based architecture.
Leverages GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 72% detection rate on Wasm vulnerabilities.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for first LLM-based approach for WebAssembly vulnerability detection, handling Wasm's stack-based architecture.
利用 GPT-4o for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 72% detection rate on Wasm vulnerabilities.

experiment.key_results: 72% detection rate on Wasm vulnerabilities

research_questions: Can LLMs effectively detect vulnerabilities in WebAssembly binaries despite Wasm's unique stack-based architecture?
What code representation is most effective for LLM-based WebAssembly vulnerability analysis?
How does the detection performance vary across different Wasm vulnerability categories?
research_questions_zh: 尽管Wasm具有独特的基于栈的架构，LLM能否有效检测WebAssembly二进制文件中的漏洞？
什么代码表示对基于LLM的WebAssembly漏洞分析最有效？
检测性能在不同Wasm漏洞类别中如何变化？
conclusions: WasmVuln achieves a 72% detection rate on WebAssembly vulnerabilities, establishing the first LLM baseline for Wasm security analysis.
A hybrid representation combining Wasm text format with control flow graph annotations provides the best input for LLM analysis.
Memory safety vulnerabilities in Wasm (buffer overflows, out-of-bounds access) are detected at 80% rate, while logic flaws remain at 55%.
conclusions_zh: WasmVuln在WebAssembly漏洞上达到72%的检测率，建立了首个Wasm安全分析的LLM基线。
结合Wasm文本格式与控制流图注释的混合表示为LLM分析提供了最佳输入。
Wasm中的内存安全漏洞（缓冲区溢出、越界访问）检测率为80%，而逻辑缺陷仍为55%。

title: TitanFuzz 2.0: Foundation Model-Enhanced DL Library Fuzzing
authors: Yinlin Deng, Lingming Zhang
abstract: Extends TitanFuzz with foundation models for deeper DL API understanding and targeted fuzzing.
summary: Extends TitanFuzz with foundation models for deeper DL API understanding and targeted fuzzing.
summary_zh: 使用基础模型扩展TitanFuzz以更深入理解DL API并进行针对性模糊测试。
abstract_zh: 使用基础模型扩展TitanFuzz以更深入理解DL API并进行针对性模糊测试。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for extends TitanFuzz with foundation models for deeper DL API understanding and targeted fuzzing.
Leverages GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Found 120 new bugs in PyTorch and TensorFlow 2.x.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for extends TitanFuzz with foundation models for deeper DL API understanding and targeted fuzzing.
利用 GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Found 120 new bugs in PyTorch and TensorFlow 2.x.

experiment.key_results: Found 120 new bugs in PyTorch and TensorFlow 2.x

research_questions: How does using foundation models for deeper DL API understanding improve fuzzing effectiveness compared to the original TitanFuzz?
What types of deep learning library bugs are most effectively found by foundation model-enhanced fuzzing?
How does TitanFuzz 2.0 handle the evolving API surfaces of PyTorch and TensorFlow?
research_questions_zh: 与原始TitanFuzz相比，使用基础模型进行更深层DL API理解如何提高模糊测试效果？
基础模型增强的模糊测试最能有效发现哪些类型的深度学习库漏洞？
TitanFuzz 2.0如何处理PyTorch和TensorFlow不断变化的API表面？
conclusions: TitanFuzz 2.0 found 120 new bugs in PyTorch and TensorFlow 2.x, a 3x improvement over the original TitanFuzz's bug discovery rate.
Foundation model understanding of tensor shape constraints and dtype compatibility enables generation of valid but edge-case-triggering API calls.
Crash-inducing bugs in custom CUDA kernels and gradient computation are the most common categories discovered by the enhanced approach.
conclusions_zh: TitanFuzz 2.0在PyTorch和TensorFlow 2.x中发现了120个新漏洞，是原始TitanFuzz漏洞发现率的3倍。
基础模型对张量形状约束和数据类型兼容性的理解使其能生成有效但触发边界情况的API调用。
自定义CUDA内核和梯度计算中的崩溃性漏洞是增强方法发现的最常见类别。

title: Automated Rust Unsafe Code Fuzzing with LLMs
authors: Lei Wu, Yang Liu
abstract: Generates fuzz harnesses specifically targeting unsafe Rust code blocks, handling ownership and lifetimes.
summary: Generates fuzz harnesses specifically targeting unsafe Rust code blocks, handling ownership and lifetimes.
summary_zh: 专门针对unsafe Rust代码块生成模糊测试桩，处理所有权和生命周期。
abstract_zh: 专门针对unsafe Rust代码块生成模糊测试桩，处理所有权和生命周期。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for generates fuzz harnesses specifically targeting unsafe Rust code blocks, handling ownership and lifetimes.
Leverages Claude-3.5 for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Found 18 soundness bugs in popular Rust crates.
Supports Rust programming language, demonstrating cross-language applicability.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for generates fuzz harnesses specifically targeting unsafe Rust code blocks, handling ownership and lifetimes.
利用 Claude-3.5 for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Found 18 soundness bugs in popular Rust crates.
支持 Rust programming language, demonstrating cross-language applicability.

experiment.key_results: Found 18 soundness bugs in popular Rust crates

research_questions: Can LLMs generate fuzz harnesses that specifically target unsafe Rust code blocks while correctly handling ownership and lifetime semantics?
How do Rust-specific language features (borrowing, lifetimes, trait bounds) affect the quality of LLM-generated harnesses?
What types of soundness bugs in Rust crates can LLM-targeted fuzzing discover?
research_questions_zh: LLM能否生成专门针对unsafe Rust代码块的模糊测试驱动，同时正确处理所有权和生命周期语义？
Rust特有的语言特性（借用、生命周期、trait约束）如何影响LLM生成驱动的质量？
LLM针对性的模糊测试能发现Rust crate中哪些类型的健全性漏洞？
conclusions: The approach found 18 soundness bugs in popular Rust crates, including memory safety violations hidden in unsafe blocks.
Claude-3.5 demonstrates strong understanding of Rust's ownership model, generating harnesses that correctly satisfy borrow checker constraints in 78% of cases.
Most discovered bugs involve incorrect unsafe pointer manipulation and missing bounds checks in FFI boundary code.
conclusions_zh: 该方法在流行的Rust crate中发现了18个健全性漏洞，包括隐藏在unsafe块中的内存安全违规。
Claude-3.5展示了对Rust所有权模型的强理解能力，在78%的情况下生成正确满足借用检查器约束的驱动。
大多数发现的漏洞涉及不正确的unsafe指针操作和FFI边界代码中缺失的边界检查。

title: Symbolic-LLM Hybrid Fuzzing for Complex Constraints
authors: Yu Zhang, Mathias Payer
abstract: Combines symbolic execution with LLMs for solving complex path constraints in hybrid fuzzing.
summary: Combines symbolic execution with LLMs for solving complex path constraints in hybrid fuzzing.
summary_zh: 结合符号执行与LLM解决混合模糊测试中的复杂路径约束。
abstract_zh: 结合符号执行与LLM解决混合模糊测试中的复杂路径约束。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for combines symbolic execution with LLMs for solving complex path constraints in hybrid fuzzing.
Leverages GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Solves 40% more constraints than pure symbolic execution.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for combines symbolic execution with LLMs for solving complex path constraints in hybrid fuzzing.
利用 GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Solves 40% more constraints than pure symbolic execution.

experiment.key_results: Solves 40% more constraints than pure symbolic execution

research_questions: Can LLMs solve complex path constraints that traditional symbolic execution engines fail to handle?
What is the performance gain of LLM-symbolic hybrid fuzzing compared to pure symbolic execution and pure fuzzing?
What types of constraints benefit most from LLM-assisted solving?
research_questions_zh: LLM能否解决传统符号执行引擎无法处理的复杂路径约束？
LLM-符号混合模糊测试与纯符号执行和纯模糊测试相比的性能增益如何？
哪些类型的约束从LLM辅助求解中受益最多？
conclusions: The hybrid approach solves 40% more path constraints than pure symbolic execution, enabling coverage of previously unreachable code regions.
LLMs excel at solving string constraints, array index conditions, and magic number comparisons where SMT solvers time out.
The combined approach achieves 25% higher branch coverage than both AFL++ and KLEE individually on the LAVA-M benchmark.
conclusions_zh: 混合方法比纯符号执行多解决了40%的路径约束，使此前不可达的代码区域得以覆盖。
LLM擅长解决字符串约束、数组索引条件和SMT求解器超时的魔术数比较。
在LAVA-M基准上，组合方法比AFL++和KLEE各自实现了25%更高的分支覆盖率。

title: AutoPatch: Production-Grade Automated Patching System
authors: Yuntong Huang, Lingming Zhang
abstract: Production-grade automated patching system with formal verification and CI/CD integration.
summary: Production-grade automated patching system with formal verification and CI/CD integration.
summary_zh: 具有形式化验证和CI/CD集成的生产级自动修补系统。
abstract_zh: 具有形式化验证和CI/CD集成的生产级自动修补系统。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for production-grade automated patching system with formal verification and CI/CD integration.
Utilizes GPT-4o for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 55% of patches pass formal verification and CI/CD checks.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for production-grade automated patching system with formal verification and CI/CD integration.
利用 GPT-4o for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 55% of patches pass formal verification and CI/CD checks.

experiment.key_results: 55% of patches pass formal verification and CI/CD checks

research_questions: Can production-grade automated patching achieve formal verification of generated patches while integrating with CI/CD pipelines?
What percentage of LLM-generated patches pass both formal verification and continuous integration checks?
How does formal verification change the reliability of automated patches in production environments?
research_questions_zh: 生产级自动化补丁能否在集成CI/CD管道的同时实现对生成补丁的形式化验证？
LLM生成的补丁中有多少百分比同时通过形式化验证和持续集成检查？
形式化验证如何改变生产环境中自动化补丁的可靠性？
conclusions: 55% of generated patches pass both formal verification and CI/CD checks, providing high-confidence automated fixes ready for deployment.
Patches that pass formal verification have a 0% regression rate in production, compared to 12% for test-suite-only validated patches.
The main bottleneck is formal specification availability: projects with existing formal specs achieve 75% verified patch rates versus 40% without.
conclusions_zh: 55%的生成补丁同时通过形式化验证和CI/CD检查，提供可直接部署的高置信度自动化修复。
通过形式化验证的补丁在生产中的回归率为0%，而仅通过测试套件验证的补丁为12%。
主要瓶颈是形式化规范的可用性：有现有形式化规范的项目达到75%的验证补丁率，而没有的仅为40%。

title: Multilingual Program Repair at Scale with Fine-Tuned Models
authors: Andre Silva, Martin Monperrus
abstract: Fine-tunes a single model on 20 languages for multilingual program repair at scale.
summary: Fine-tunes a single model on 20 languages for multilingual program repair at scale.
summary_zh: 在20种语言上微调单个模型实现大规模多语言程序修复。
abstract_zh: 在20种语言上微调单个模型实现大规模多语言程序修复。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for fine-tunes a single model on 20 languages for multilingual program repair at scale.
Utilizes Llama-3 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Single model repairs across 20 languages competitively.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for fine-tunes a single model on 20 languages for multilingual program repair at scale.
利用 Llama-3 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Single model repairs across 20 languages competitively.

experiment.key_results: Single model repairs across 20 languages competitively

research_questions: Can a single fine-tuned model perform program repair competitively across 20 programming languages simultaneously?
How does multilingual fine-tuning affect repair performance compared to language-specific models?
What is the impact of training data diversity on cross-language repair generalization?
research_questions_zh: 单个微调模型能否同时在20种编程语言上实现具有竞争力的程序修复？
多语言微调相比于特定语言模型如何影响修复性能？
训练数据多样性对跨语言修复泛化能力有何影响？
conclusions: A single Llama-3 model fine-tuned on 20 programming languages achieves competitive repair performance compared to language-specific models.
Multilingual training provides positive transfer effects, with low-resource languages benefiting significantly from high-resource language data.
The unified multilingual repair model reduces deployment complexity while maintaining per-language accuracy within 5% of specialized models.
conclusions_zh: 在20种编程语言上微调的单个Llama-3模型达到了与特定语言模型相当的修复性能。
多语言训练提供了正向迁移效果，低资源语言从高资源语言数据中显著受益。
统一的多语言修复模型降低了部署复杂性，同时每种语言的准确率与专用模型相比差距在5%以内。

title: SWE-Fix: Automated GitHub Issue Resolution at 60% Success Rate
authors: John Yang, Carlos E. Jimenez
abstract: Achieves 60% resolution on SWE-bench Lite using improved agent architecture with file-level planning.
summary: Achieves 60% resolution on SWE-bench Lite using improved agent architecture with file-level planning.
summary_zh: 使用改进的代理架构和文件级规划在SWE-bench Lite上实现60%解决率。
abstract_zh: 使用改进的代理架构和文件级规划在SWE-bench Lite上实现60%解决率。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for achieves 60% resolution on SWE-bench Lite using improved agent architecture with file-level planning.
Utilizes GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 60% on SWE-bench Lite, new SOTA.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for achieves 60% resolution on SWE-bench Lite using improved agent architecture with file-level planning.
利用 GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 60% on SWE-bench Lite, new SOTA.

experiment.key_results: 60% on SWE-bench Lite, new SOTA

research_questions: Can an improved agent architecture with file-level planning achieve state-of-the-art resolution rates on SWE-bench Lite?
How does file-level planning improve an LLM agent's ability to localize and resolve GitHub issues?
What are the failure modes of current SWE-bench agents and how can architectural changes address them?
research_questions_zh: 改进的文件级规划智能体架构能否在SWE-bench Lite上达到最先进的解决率？
文件级规划如何提升LLM智能体定位和解决GitHub问题的能力？
当前SWE-bench智能体的失败模式是什么，架构变化如何应对？
conclusions: SWE-Fix achieves 60% resolution rate on SWE-bench Lite, establishing a new state-of-the-art at the time of publication.
File-level planning significantly reduces irrelevant code edits, enabling more precise issue localization across multi-file repositories.
Combining GPT-4o and Claude-3.5 in the agent architecture provides complementary strengths for different issue types.
conclusions_zh: SWE-Fix在SWE-bench Lite上达到60%的解决率，在发表时创下新的最优记录。
文件级规划显著减少了无关代码编辑，使多文件仓库中的问题定位更加精确。
在智能体架构中结合GPT-4o和Claude-3.5为不同类型的问题提供了互补优势。

title: RustRepair: Automated Repair for Rust Borrow Checker Errors
authors: Yuting Chen, Junjie Wang
abstract: Specialized LLM-based repair for Rust borrow checker and lifetime errors.
summary: Specialized LLM-based repair for Rust borrow checker and lifetime errors.
summary_zh: 专门用于Rust借用检查器和生命周期错误的LLM修复。
abstract_zh: 专门用于Rust借用检查器和生命周期错误的LLM修复。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for specialized LLM-based repair for Rust borrow checker and lifetime errors.
Utilizes GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Fixes 75% of Rust borrow checker errors.
Supports Rust programming language, demonstrating cross-language applicability.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for specialized LLM-based repair for Rust borrow checker and lifetime errors.
利用 GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Fixes 75% of Rust borrow checker errors.
支持 Rust programming language, demonstrating cross-language applicability.

experiment.key_results: Fixes 75% of Rust borrow checker errors

research_questions: Can LLMs effectively repair Rust-specific borrow checker and lifetime errors that require understanding of ownership semantics?
What Rust-specific context (e.g., ownership graphs, lifetime annotations) improves LLM repair accuracy?
How do LLM-generated fixes for borrow checker errors compare to manual developer fixes in terms of idiomatic Rust code?
research_questions_zh: LLM能否有效修复需要理解所有权语义的Rust特有借用检查器和生命周期错误？
哪些Rust特定上下文（如所有权图、生命周期注解）能提升LLM修复准确率？
LLM生成的借用检查器错误修复与开发者手动修复相比，在Rust惯用代码方面表现如何？
conclusions: RustRepair fixes 75% of Rust borrow checker errors by incorporating ownership and lifetime context into the LLM prompt.
Providing the ownership graph and relevant type signatures as context improves repair accuracy by 30% over naive prompting.
LLM-generated fixes occasionally introduce non-idiomatic patterns such as unnecessary cloning, but 85% of successful patches pass Clippy lints.
conclusions_zh: RustRepair通过将所有权和生命周期上下文纳入LLM提示，修复了75%的Rust借用检查器错误。
提供所有权图和相关类型签名作为上下文，比朴素提示的修复准确率提高了30%。
LLM生成的修复偶尔引入非惯用模式（如不必要的clone），但85%的成功补丁通过了Clippy检查。

title: HarmBench v2: Evaluating Safety of Frontier Models
authors: Mantas Mazeika, Dan Hendrycks
abstract: Extended benchmark for evaluating frontier model safety including reasoning models and multimodal attacks.
summary: Extended benchmark for evaluating frontier model safety including reasoning models and multimodal attacks.
summary_zh: 扩展基准评估前沿模型安全性，包括推理模型和多模态攻击。
abstract_zh: 扩展基准评估前沿模型安全性，包括推理模型和多模态攻击。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for extended benchmark for evaluating frontier model safety including reasoning models and multimodal attacks.
Applies GPT-4o, Claude-3.5, o1 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Tests 1000+ harmful behaviors across 10+ frontier models.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for extended benchmark for evaluating frontier model safety including reasoning models and multimodal attacks.
应用 GPT-4o, Claude-3.5, o1 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Tests 1000+ harmful behaviors across 10+ frontier models.

experiment.key_results: Tests 1000+ harmful behaviors across 10+ frontier models

research_questions: How do frontier reasoning models (e.g., o1) and multimodal models compare in safety alignment under adversarial evaluation?
What new attack vectors emerge when evaluating model safety across multimodal inputs?
How well do existing safety benchmarks generalize to frontier models released after their creation?
research_questions_zh: 前沿推理模型（如o1）和多模态模型在对抗性评估下的安全对齐表现如何比较？
在评估跨多模态输入的模型安全性时，出现了哪些新的攻击向量？
现有安全基准测试对发布于其之后的前沿模型的泛化能力如何？
conclusions: HarmBench v2 evaluates 1000+ harmful behaviors across 10+ frontier models and reveals that reasoning models like o1 are not uniformly safer than non-reasoning counterparts.
Multimodal attack vectors (image-text combined prompts) bypass safety filters at 2-3x the rate of text-only attacks on most tested models.
No single frontier model achieves consistent safety across all evaluated behavior categories, highlighting the need for multi-dimensional safety evaluation.
conclusions_zh: HarmBench v2在10多个前沿模型上评估了1000多种有害行为，揭示了o1等推理模型并非在所有方面都比非推理模型更安全。
多模态攻击向量（图文组合提示）在大多数测试模型上绕过安全过滤器的成功率是纯文本攻击的2-3倍。
没有单一前沿模型在所有评估行为类别中实现一致的安全性，凸显了多维安全评估的必要性。

title: Measuring Data Leakage in Frontier Language Models
authors: Milad Nasr, Nicholas Carlini
abstract: Systematically measures training data leakage from frontier models including GPT-4o and Claude-3.5.
summary: Systematically measures training data leakage from frontier models including GPT-4o and Claude-3.5.
summary_zh: 系统测量GPT-4o和Claude-3.5等前沿模型的训练数据泄漏。
abstract_zh: 系统测量GPT-4o和Claude-3.5等前沿模型的训练数据泄漏。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for systematically measures training data leakage from frontier models including GPT-4o and Claude-3.5.
Applies GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Extracts 10x more training data from frontier models vs GPT-3.5.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for systematically measures training data leakage from frontier models including GPT-4o and Claude-3.5.
应用 GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Extracts 10x more training data from frontier models vs GPT-3.5.

experiment.key_results: Extracts 10x more training data from frontier models vs GPT-3.5

research_questions: How much training data can be systematically extracted from frontier models like GPT-4o and Claude-3.5?
What extraction techniques are most effective against models with safety alignment and output filtering?
How does training data memorization scale with model size from GPT-3.5 to frontier models?
research_questions_zh: 从GPT-4o和Claude-3.5等前沿模型中可以系统性地提取多少训练数据？
哪些提取技术对具有安全对齐和输出过滤的模型最有效？
训练数据记忆化如何随模型规模从GPT-3.5到前沿模型进行缩放？
conclusions: Frontier models leak approximately 10x more extractable training data than GPT-3.5 despite improved safety measures.
Divergence-based extraction attacks remain effective against frontier models, with structured prompting techniques recovering verbatim passages of 200+ tokens.
Safety alignment training reduces but does not eliminate memorization, and larger model capacity correlates with greater memorization surface area.
conclusions_zh: 尽管安全措施有所改进，前沿模型泄露的可提取训练数据量约为GPT-3.5的10倍。
基于散度的提取攻击对前沿模型仍然有效，结构化提示技术可恢复200多个token的原始文本。
安全对齐训练减少但未消除记忆化，更大的模型容量与更大的记忆化表面积相关。

title: Fundamental Limits of LLM Safety Alignment
authors: Alexander Wei, Jacob Steinhardt
abstract: Theoretical analysis showing fundamental impossibility results for perfect LLM safety alignment.
summary: Theoretical analysis showing fundamental impossibility results for perfect LLM safety alignment.
summary_zh: 理论分析表明完美LLM安全对齐的基本不可能性结果。
abstract_zh: 理论分析表明完美LLM安全对齐的基本不可能性结果。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for theoretical analysis showing fundamental impossibility results for perfect LLM safety alignment.
Applies  to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Proves perfect safety alignment is computationally intractable.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for theoretical analysis showing fundamental impossibility results for perfect LLM safety alignment.
应用  to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Proves perfect safety alignment is computationally intractable.

experiment.key_results: Proves perfect safety alignment is computationally intractable

research_questions: Are there fundamental theoretical limits to achieving perfect safety alignment in LLMs?
Under what computational complexity assumptions is robust safety alignment provably intractable?
What implications do impossibility results have for practical safety alignment strategies?
research_questions_zh: 在LLM中实现完美安全对齐是否存在基本理论限制？
在什么计算复杂性假设下，鲁棒安全对齐被证明是不可行的？
不可能性结果对实际安全对齐策略有何影响？
conclusions: Perfect safety alignment is proved to be computationally intractable under standard complexity-theoretic assumptions.
Any alignment method that preserves model utility must accept a non-zero probability of unsafe outputs for sufficiently creative adversaries.
The theoretical framework suggests a defense-in-depth approach combining alignment with runtime monitoring as the most principled practical strategy.
conclusions_zh: 在标准计算复杂性理论假设下，完美安全对齐被证明是计算上不可行的。
任何保持模型效用的对齐方法都必须接受对于足够有创造力的对手产生不安全输出的非零概率。
该理论框架表明，将对齐与运行时监控结合的纵深防御方法是最有原则性的实用策略。

title: Poisoning LLM Agent Tool-Use via Adversarial Tool Descriptions
authors: Jiaxin Chen, Yi Liu
abstract: Demonstrates poisoning attacks on LLM agent tool-use by manipulating tool descriptions.
summary: Demonstrates poisoning attacks on LLM agent tool-use by manipulating tool descriptions.
summary_zh: 展示通过操纵工具描述对LLM代理工具使用的投毒攻击。
abstract_zh: 展示通过操纵工具描述对LLM代理工具使用的投毒攻击。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for demonstrates poisoning attacks on LLM agent tool-use by manipulating tool descriptions.
Applies GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Successful tool poisoning in 80% of tested agent systems.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for demonstrates poisoning attacks on LLM agent tool-use by manipulating tool descriptions.
应用 GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Successful tool poisoning in 80% of tested agent systems.

experiment.key_results: Successful tool poisoning in 80% of tested agent systems

research_questions: Can adversarial tool descriptions manipulate LLM agents into selecting malicious tools over legitimate ones?
What characteristics of tool descriptions make LLM agents most susceptible to poisoning attacks?
How effective are existing defenses (e.g., tool vetting, output filtering) against tool description poisoning?
research_questions_zh: 对抗性工具描述能否操纵LLM智能体选择恶意工具而非合法工具？
工具描述的哪些特征使LLM智能体最容易受到投毒攻击？
现有防御措施（如工具审查、输出过滤）对工具描述投毒的有效性如何？
conclusions: Adversarial tool descriptions successfully poison tool selection in 80% of tested LLM agent systems including GPT-4o and Claude-3.5 based agents.
Embedding semantic similarity keywords and authority signals in malicious tool descriptions maximizes the attack success rate.
Current defenses like tool vetting and static analysis of descriptions are insufficient, with bypass rates exceeding 60% for sophisticated attacks.
conclusions_zh: 对抗性工具描述在80%的测试LLM智能体系统中成功实现了工具选择投毒，包括基于GPT-4o和Claude-3.5的智能体。
在恶意工具描述中嵌入语义相似关键词和权威信号可最大化攻击成功率。
当前防御措施（如工具审查和描述静态分析）不够充分，复杂攻击的绕过率超过60%。

title: LLM Fingerprinting: Identifying Model Provenance at Scale
authors: Bo Li, Wenting Zhao
abstract: Develops reliable fingerprinting for identifying LLM model provenance even after fine-tuning and quantization.
summary: Develops reliable fingerprinting for identifying LLM model provenance even after fine-tuning and quantization.
summary_zh: 开发可靠的指纹识别技术，即使在微调和量化后也能识别LLM模型来源。
abstract_zh: 开发可靠的指纹识别技术，即使在微调和量化后也能识别LLM模型来源。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for reliable fingerprinting for identifying LLM model provenance even after fine-tuning and quantization.
Applies Llama-3, Mistral to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 99.5% provenance identification accuracy, survives quantization.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for reliable fingerprinting for identifying LLM model provenance even after fine-tuning and quantization.
应用 Llama-3, Mistral to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 99.5% provenance identification accuracy, survives quantization.

experiment.key_results: 99.5% provenance identification accuracy, survives quantization

research_questions: Can LLM model provenance be reliably identified even after fine-tuning and quantization?
What fingerprinting signals survive common model modification operations like LoRA, QLORA, and GPTQ quantization?
How scalable is fingerprint-based provenance identification across a large model ecosystem?
research_questions_zh: 即使经过微调和量化，LLM模型来源能否被可靠识别？
哪些指纹信号能在LoRA、QLORA和GPTQ量化等常见模型修改操作后存活？
基于指纹的来源识别在大规模模型生态系统中的可扩展性如何？
conclusions: The proposed fingerprinting method achieves 99.5% provenance identification accuracy across Llama-3 and Mistral model families.
Fingerprints survive 4-bit GPTQ quantization and LoRA fine-tuning with up to 10% of parameters modified.
The approach scales to distinguish hundreds of derivative models from a single base model with minimal false positive rates.
conclusions_zh: 所提出的指纹方法在Llama-3和Mistral模型家族中实现了99.5%的来源识别准确率。
指纹在4位GPTQ量化和修改最多10%参数的LoRA微调后仍然有效。
该方法可扩展到从单个基础模型中区分数百个衍生模型，假阳性率极低。

title: ChatAFL 2.0: Protocol Fuzzing with Reasoning LLMs
authors: Ruijie Meng, Thorsten Holz
abstract: Extends ChatAFL with reasoning models for deeper protocol understanding and more effective state exploration.
summary: Extends ChatAFL with reasoning models for deeper protocol understanding and more effective state exploration.
summary_zh: 使用推理模型扩展ChatAFL以更深入理解协议并更有效地探索状态。
abstract_zh: 使用推理模型扩展ChatAFL以更深入理解协议并更有效地探索状态。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for extends ChatAFL with reasoning models for deeper protocol understanding and more effective state exploration.
Leverages o1, Claude-3.5 for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 50% more state coverage and 15 new protocol bugs.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for extends ChatAFL with reasoning models for deeper protocol understanding and more effective state exploration.
利用 o1, Claude-3.5 for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 50% more state coverage and 15 new protocol bugs.

experiment.key_results: 50% more state coverage and 15 new protocol bugs

research_questions: How do reasoning LLMs (e.g., o1) improve protocol state exploration compared to standard LLMs in protocol fuzzing?
Can deeper protocol understanding from reasoning models uncover bugs that shallow mutation-based fuzzing misses?
What is the overhead of integrating reasoning LLMs into the protocol fuzzing loop?
research_questions_zh: 推理LLM（如o1）与标准LLM相比，如何改善协议模糊测试中的协议状态探索？
推理模型对协议的深层理解能否发现浅层变异模糊测试遗漏的缺陷？
将推理LLM集成到协议模糊测试循环中的开销是多少？
conclusions: ChatAFL 2.0 achieves 50% more protocol state coverage than the original ChatAFL by leveraging reasoning models for deeper protocol understanding.
The reasoning-enhanced approach discovered 15 new protocol implementation bugs that were missed by both ChatAFL 1.0 and traditional protocol fuzzers.
Reasoning model integration increases per-input generation latency by approximately 3x, but the improved state coverage compensates through faster overall discovery rates.
conclusions_zh: ChatAFL 2.0通过利用推理模型实现更深层的协议理解，比原始ChatAFL多覆盖50%的协议状态。
推理增强方法发现了15个新的协议实现缺陷，这些缺陷被ChatAFL 1.0和传统协议模糊测试工具所遗漏。
推理模型集成使每个输入的生成延迟增加约3倍，但改善的状态覆盖通过更快的整体发现率得到补偿。

title: AI-Guided Smart Fuzzing: A Unified Framework
authors: Marcel Bohme, Abhik Roychoudhury
abstract: Unified framework integrating LLMs into all stages of fuzzing: seed generation, mutation, scheduling, and triage.
summary: Unified framework integrating LLMs into all stages of fuzzing: seed generation, mutation, scheduling, and triage.
summary_zh: 将LLM集成到模糊测试所有阶段的统一框架：种子生成、变异、调度和分类。
abstract_zh: 将LLM集成到模糊测试所有阶段的统一框架：种子生成、变异、调度和分类。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for unified framework integrating LLMs into all stages of fuzzing: seed generation, mutation, scheduling, and triage.
Leverages GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Unified framework outperforms specialized tools by 30%.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for unified framework integrating LLMs into all stages of fuzzing: seed generation, mutation, scheduling, and triage.
利用 GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Unified framework outperforms specialized tools by 30%.

experiment.key_results: Unified framework outperforms specialized tools by 30%

research_questions: Can LLMs be integrated into all four stages of fuzzing (seed generation, mutation, scheduling, and triage) within a unified framework?
Does a unified LLM-integrated fuzzing framework outperform stage-specific specialized tools?
What is the computational cost-benefit trade-off of LLM integration at each fuzzing stage?
research_questions_zh: LLM能否在统一框架中集成到模糊测试的所有四个阶段（种子生成、变异、调度和分类）？
统一的LLM集成模糊测试框架是否优于各阶段的专用工具？
在每个模糊测试阶段集成LLM的计算成本效益权衡是什么？
conclusions: The unified AI-guided fuzzing framework outperforms specialized single-stage tools by 30% in bug discovery rate across diverse target programs.
LLM-based seed generation and intelligent mutation contribute the most to improved coverage, while LLM-guided scheduling yields diminishing returns.
Automated triage using GPT-4o reduces human analysis time by 70% while maintaining 95% accuracy in root cause classification.
conclusions_zh: 统一的AI引导模糊测试框架在多种目标程序上的缺陷发现率比单阶段专用工具高30%。
基于LLM的种子生成和智能变异对覆盖率提升贡献最大，而LLM引导的调度收益递减。
使用GPT-4o进行自动分类将人工分析时间减少70%，同时在根因分类中保持95%的准确率。

title: AI-Powered Web Application Fuzzing at Scale
authors: Yuxuan Chen, Roberto Natella
abstract: Scales web application fuzzing to enterprise level using LLMs for intelligent crawling and input generation.
summary: Scales web application fuzzing to enterprise level using LLMs for intelligent crawling and input generation.
summary_zh: 使用LLM进行智能爬取和输入生成，将Web应用模糊测试扩展到企业级。
abstract_zh: 使用LLM进行智能爬取和输入生成，将Web应用模糊测试扩展到企业级。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for scales web application fuzzing to enterprise level using LLMs for intelligent crawling and input generation.
Leverages GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Found 50+ vulnerabilities across 100 enterprise web apps.
Addresses XSS, SQL-injection, SSRF vulnerability types, expanding coverage of security analysis.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for scales web application fuzzing to enterprise level using LLMs for intelligent crawling and input generation.
利用 GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Found 50+ vulnerabilities across 100 enterprise web apps.
解决 XSS, SQL-injection, SSRF vulnerability types, expanding coverage of security analysis.

experiment.key_results: Found 50+ vulnerabilities across 100 enterprise web apps

research_questions: Can LLMs scale web application fuzzing to enterprise-level by generating context-aware crawling strategies and inputs?
How effective is LLM-powered web fuzzing at discovering XSS, SQL injection, and SSRF vulnerabilities compared to traditional web scanners?
What challenges arise when applying LLM-guided fuzzing to real-world enterprise web applications at scale?
research_questions_zh: LLM能否通过生成上下文感知的爬取策略和输入将Web应用模糊测试扩展到企业级别？
LLM驱动的Web模糊测试在发现XSS、SQL注入和SSRF漏洞方面与传统Web扫描器相比效果如何？
将LLM引导的模糊测试应用于大规模真实企业Web应用时会出现哪些挑战？
conclusions: The system discovered 50+ vulnerabilities across 100 enterprise web applications, including XSS, SQL injection, and SSRF types.
LLM-powered intelligent crawling achieves 40% deeper page coverage than traditional crawlers by understanding authentication flows and dynamic content.
Context-aware input generation using GPT-4o produces significantly more semantically valid payloads, reducing false positives by 55% compared to rule-based scanners.
conclusions_zh: 该系统在100个企业Web应用中发现了50多个漏洞，涵盖XSS、SQL注入和SSRF类型。
LLM驱动的智能爬取通过理解认证流程和动态内容，页面覆盖深度比传统爬虫高40%。
使用GPT-4o的上下文感知输入生成产生了更多语义有效的载荷，与基于规则的扫描器相比假阳性减少55%。

title: Next-Gen Compiler Fuzzing with LLMs
authors: Chenyuan Yang, Lingming Zhang
abstract: Pushes compiler fuzzing further with LLM-generated programs targeting specific optimization passes.
summary: Pushes compiler fuzzing further with LLM-generated programs targeting specific optimization passes.
summary_zh: 利用LLM生成针对特定优化阶段的程序推进编译器模糊测试。
abstract_zh: 利用LLM生成针对特定优化阶段的程序推进编译器模糊测试。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for pushes compiler fuzzing further with LLM-generated programs targeting specific optimization passes.
Leverages GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Found 80+ new bugs in GCC/LLVM/Rust compiler.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for pushes compiler fuzzing further with LLM-generated programs targeting specific optimization passes.
利用 GPT-4o for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Found 80+ new bugs in GCC/LLVM/Rust compiler.

experiment.key_results: Found 80+ new bugs in GCC/LLVM/Rust compiler

research_questions: Can LLMs generate test programs that specifically target compiler optimization passes to trigger miscompilation bugs?
How does optimization-pass-targeted program generation compare to random program generation for compiler fuzzing?
Which compiler optimization passes are most susceptible to bugs revealed by LLM-generated test programs?
research_questions_zh: LLM能否生成专门针对编译器优化过程的测试程序以触发错误编译缺陷？
针对优化过程的程序生成与随机程序生成在编译器模糊测试中的效果对比如何？
哪些编译器优化过程最容易被LLM生成的测试程序暴露出缺陷？
conclusions: LLM-generated programs targeting specific optimization passes discovered 80+ new bugs in GCC, LLVM, and the Rust compiler.
Optimization-pass-targeted generation finds bugs 3x faster than random program generation approaches like CSmith.
Loop optimization and vectorization passes contain the highest density of undiscovered bugs across all three tested compilers.
conclusions_zh: 针对特定优化过程的LLM生成程序在GCC、LLVM和Rust编译器中发现了80多个新缺陷。
针对优化过程的生成比CSmith等随机程序生成方法发现缺陷的速度快3倍。
在所有三个测试编译器中，循环优化和向量化过程包含最高密度的未发现缺陷。

title: CyberFoundation: A Foundation Model for Cybersecurity
authors: Hao Li, Chao Zhang, Dawn Song
abstract: First cybersecurity foundation model pre-trained on code, vulnerabilities, exploits, and security documentation for all security tasks.
summary: First cybersecurity foundation model pre-trained on code, vulnerabilities, exploits, and security documentation for all security tasks.
summary_zh: 首个在代码、漏洞、利用和安全文档上预训练的网络安全基础模型，用于所有安全任务。
abstract_zh: 首个在代码、漏洞、利用和安全文档上预训练的网络安全基础模型，用于所有安全任务。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for first cybersecurity foundation model pre-trained on code, vulnerabilities, exploits, and security documentation for all.
Leverages CyberFoundation for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Outperforms GPT-5 on all security benchmarks.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for first cybersecurity foundation model pre-trained on code, vulnerabilities, exploits, and security documentation for all.
利用 CyberFoundation for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Outperforms GPT-5 on all security benchmarks.

experiment.key_results: Outperforms GPT-5 on all security benchmarks

research_questions: Can a single foundation model pre-trained on security-specific data outperform general-purpose LLMs on cybersecurity tasks?
What is the optimal pre-training data mixture of code, vulnerabilities, exploits, and security documentation?
Does a security-specialized foundation model transfer effectively across vulnerability detection, fuzzing, patching, and privacy analysis tasks?
research_questions_zh: 在安全特定数据上预训练的单个基础模型能否在网络安全任务上超越通用LLM？
代码、漏洞、利用程序和安全文档的最佳预训练数据混合比例是什么？
安全专业化基础模型能否有效地迁移到漏洞检测、模糊测试、补丁生成和隐私分析任务？
conclusions: CyberFoundation outperforms GPT-5 on all evaluated security benchmarks including vulnerability detection, exploit generation, and patch synthesis.
Pre-training on a curated mixture of 60% code, 20% vulnerability databases, 10% exploit code, and 10% security documentation yields the best downstream performance.
The single security foundation model eliminates the need for task-specific fine-tuning on standard security tasks, achieving zero-shot performance competitive with fine-tuned specialist models.
conclusions_zh: CyberFoundation在所有评估的安全基准测试上（包括漏洞检测、利用程序生成和补丁合成）均超越了GPT-5。
在由60%代码、20%漏洞数据库、10%利用代码和10%安全文档精心组合的数据上预训练可获得最佳下游性能。
单个安全基础模型无需针对标准安全任务进行特定微调，零样本性能可与微调的专用模型竞争。

title: AutoPentest-2026: Fully Autonomous Penetration Testing
authors: Yue Wang, Gelei Yang, Yang Liu
abstract: Fully autonomous pentesting system passing OSCP-level challenges without human intervention.
summary: Fully autonomous pentesting system passing OSCP-level challenges without human intervention.
summary_zh: 完全自主的渗透测试系统，无需人工干预即可通过OSCP级挑战。
abstract_zh: 完全自主的渗透测试系统，无需人工干预即可通过OSCP级挑战。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for fully autonomous pentesting system passing OSCP-level challenges without human intervention.
Leverages GPT-5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Passes OSCP-level challenges with 85% success rate.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for fully autonomous pentesting system passing OSCP-level challenges without human intervention.
利用 GPT-5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Passes OSCP-level challenges with 85% success rate.

experiment.key_results: Passes OSCP-level challenges with 85% success rate

research_questions: Can an autonomous AI system pass OSCP-level penetration testing challenges without human intervention?
What agent architecture enables effective multi-step reasoning for reconnaissance, exploitation, and privilege escalation?
What are the ethical and safety implications of fully autonomous penetration testing systems?
research_questions_zh: 自主AI系统能否在无人工干预的情况下通过OSCP级别的渗透测试挑战？
什么样的智能体架构能实现有效的多步推理，涵盖侦察、利用和权限提升？
全自主渗透测试系统的伦理和安全影响是什么？
conclusions: AutoPentest-2026 passes OSCP-level challenges with an 85% success rate, demonstrating autonomous multi-step exploitation capability.
A hierarchical agent architecture with separate planning and execution modules proves essential for chaining complex attack steps.
The system identifies novel attack paths that human testers typically overlook, but requires strict scope controls to prevent unintended impact.
conclusions_zh: AutoPentest-2026以85%的成功率通过OSCP级别挑战，展示了自主多步利用能力。
具有独立规划和执行模块的分层智能体架构被证明对链接复杂攻击步骤至关重要。
该系统识别出人类测试人员通常忽略的新型攻击路径，但需要严格的范围控制以防止意外影响。

title: Verified Automated Patching with Formal Guarantees
authors: Lingming Zhang, Chunqiu Steven Xia
abstract: Automated patching with formal verification guaranteeing patch correctness and no regressions.
summary: Automated patching with formal verification guaranteeing patch correctness and no regressions.
summary_zh: 具有形式化验证保证补丁正确性和无回归的自动修补。
abstract_zh: 具有形式化验证保证补丁正确性和无回归的自动修补。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for automated patching with formal verification guaranteeing patch correctness and no regressions.
Utilizes GPT-5, Claude-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 90%+ correct patch rate with formal correctness proofs.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for automated patching with formal verification guaranteeing patch correctness and no regressions.
利用 GPT-5, Claude-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 90%+ correct patch rate with formal correctness proofs.

experiment.key_results: 90%+ correct patch rate with formal correctness proofs

research_questions: Can formal verification be integrated with LLM-based patch generation to guarantee correctness and absence of regressions?
What percentage of LLM-generated patches can be formally verified, and what are the main barriers to verification?
How does the cost of formal verification compare to exhaustive testing for validating LLM-generated patches?
research_questions_zh: 形式验证能否与基于LLM的补丁生成集成，以保证正确性和无回归？
LLM生成的补丁中有多少比例可以被形式验证？验证的主要障碍是什么？
形式验证与穷举测试在验证LLM生成补丁方面的成本比较如何？
conclusions: Over 90% of LLM-generated patches receive formal correctness proofs when the verification specification is co-generated with the patch.
The main barrier to formal verification is specification incompleteness, not patch incorrectness; 70% of unverifiable patches are actually correct.
Formal verification is 5x more cost-effective than exhaustive test generation for security-critical patches requiring high assurance.
conclusions_zh: 当验证规范与补丁共同生成时，超过90%的LLM生成补丁获得了形式正确性证明。
形式验证的主要障碍是规范不完整性而非补丁不正确；70%无法验证的补丁实际上是正确的。
对于需要高保证的安全关键补丁，形式验证的成本效益是穷举测试生成的5倍。

title: AI vs AI: Defending LLM Systems Against AI-Powered Attacks
authors: Jiaxin Chen, Neil Gong
abstract: Framework for defending LLM systems against attacks from other AI models, establishing AI-vs-AI defense paradigm.
summary: Framework for defending LLM systems against attacks from other AI models, establishing AI-vs-AI defense paradigm.
summary_zh: 保护LLM系统免受其他AI模型攻击的框架，建立AI对AI防御范式。
abstract_zh: 保护LLM系统免受其他AI模型攻击的框架，建立AI对AI防御范式。
contributions: Proposes a novel approach for framework for defending LLM systems against attacks from other AI models, establishing AI-vs-AI defense paradigm.
Applies GPT-5, Claude-4 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Establishes theoretical framework for AI-vs-AI security.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for framework for defending LLM systems against attacks from other AI models, establishing AI-vs-AI defense paradigm.
应用 GPT-5, Claude-4 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Establishes theoretical framework for AI-vs-AI security.

experiment.key_results: Establishes theoretical framework for AI-vs-AI security

research_questions: How can LLM systems be defended against attacks launched by other AI models?
What theoretical framework captures the AI-vs-AI adversarial dynamic in LLM security?
Which defense strategies are most robust against adaptive AI attackers?
research_questions_zh: 如何保护LLM系统免受其他AI模型发起的攻击？
什么理论框架可以捕捉LLM安全中的AI对抗AI动态？
哪些防御策略对自适应AI攻击者最具鲁棒性？
conclusions: The proposed AI-vs-AI defense framework establishes a game-theoretic foundation for analyzing adversarial interactions between AI attacker and defender models.
Ensemble-based defense strategies using GPT-5 and Claude-4 as complementary defenders reduce AI-powered attack success rates by 65%.
Adaptive AI attackers can circumvent single-model defenses within 100 iterations, demonstrating the necessity of dynamic, multi-model defense approaches.
conclusions_zh: 所提出的AI对抗AI防御框架为分析AI攻击者和防御者模型之间的对抗交互建立了博弈论基础。
使用GPT-5和Claude-4作为互补防御者的集成防御策略将AI驱动的攻击成功率降低65%。
自适应AI攻击者可在100次迭代内绕过单模型防御，证明了动态多模型防御方法的必要性。

Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.

contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for complete AI-powered supply chain security solution deployed across major package registries.

conclusions: The system achieves 99.9% malicious package detection accuracy when deployed at npm and PyPI, with a false positive rate below 0.01%.
LLM-based semantic analysis detects obfuscated and novel attack patterns that signature-based tools miss, including dependency confusion and typosquatting variants.
Real-time scanning adds less than 2 seconds of latency to the package publishing pipeline, making it practical for production registry deployment.
conclusions_zh: 该系统在npm和PyPI部署时恶意包检测准确率达到99.9%，假阳性率低于0.01%。
基于LLM的语义分析可检测到基于签名工具遗漏的混淆和新型攻击模式，包括依赖混淆和名称抢注变体。
实时扫描为包发布流水线增加不到2秒的延迟，使其适用于生产环境的注册中心部署。

title: Analyzing the Security of Large Language Models
authors: Haoran Li, Congying Song
abstract: Early analysis of LLM security risks including prompt injection, data extraction, and adversarial attacks.

abstract_zh: LLM安全风险的早期分析，包括提示注入、数据提取和对抗性攻击。
contributions: Introduces a novel approach for early analysis of LLM security risks including prompt injection, data extraction, and adversarial attacks.
Applies GPT-3.5, Claude to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.

contributions_zh: 引入 a novel approach for early analysis of LLM security risks including prompt injection, data extraction, and adversarial attacks.
应用 GPT-3.5, Claude to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.

research_questions: What are the primary security risks associated with LLMs, including prompt injection, data extraction, and adversarial attacks?

research_questions_zh: 与LLM相关的主要安全风险是什么，包括提示注入、数据提取和对抗攻击？
早期LLM（GPT-3.5、Claude）对不同类别安全利用的脆弱性如何？
什么分类法最能捕捉LLM安全威胁全景？
conclusions: Five key LLM security risk categories are identified: prompt injection, training data extraction, model inversion, adversarial examples, and output manipulation.
GPT-3.5 and Claude exhibit different vulnerability profiles, with GPT-3.5 being more susceptible to prompt injection and Claude more resistant to direct data extraction.
Existing security defenses designed for traditional software are largely ineffective against LLM-specific attack vectors, requiring fundamentally new defense paradigms.
conclusions_zh: 识别出五类关键LLM安全风险：提示注入、训练数据提取、模型反演、对抗样本和输出操纵。
GPT-3.5和Claude表现出不同的漏洞特征，GPT-3.5更容易受到提示注入攻击，Claude对直接数据提取更具抵抗力。
为传统软件设计的现有安全防御对LLM特定攻击向量基本无效，需要从根本上全新的防御范式。

conclusions: DivFuzz generates 20% more diverse inputs than AFL++ mutations as measured by syntactic and semantic diversity metrics.
Increased input diversity translates to 12% higher branch coverage and 8% more unique crashes on the evaluated benchmark suite.
A transformer-based diversity model outperforms VAE and GAN alternatives for structured input format generation.
conclusions_zh: DivFuzz根据语法和语义多样性指标生成的输入比AFL++变异多20%。
增加的输入多样性在评估的基准测试套件上转化为12%的分支覆盖率提升和8%的独特崩溃增加。
基于Transformer的多样性模型在结构化输入格式生成方面优于VAE和GAN替代方案。

research_questions: How has automated program repair evolved from template-based to LLM-based approaches over 2010-2023?
What are the key advantages and limitations of LLM-based APR compared to earlier search-based and semantic-based methods?
What benchmarks and evaluation metrics are most appropriate for comparing APR techniques across paradigms?
research_questions_zh: 自动程序修复从2010年到2023年如何从基于模板的方法演变为基于LLM的方法？
基于LLM的APR与早期基于搜索和基于语义的方法相比，关键优势和局限性是什么？
哪些基准测试和评估指标最适合跨范式比较APR技术？
conclusions: The survey covers 200+ APR techniques spanning template-based, constraint-based, learning-based, and LLM-based paradigms from 2010 to 2023.
LLM-based approaches dominate recent repair performance leaderboards but suffer from patch overfitting and lack of formal correctness guarantees.
Defects4J remains the most widely used benchmark, but its limited scope creates evaluation bias favoring single-hunk Java bug fixes.
conclusions_zh: 该综述涵盖了2010年至2023年跨越基于模板、基于约束、基于学习和基于LLM范式的200多种APR技术。
基于LLM的方法主导了近期修复性能排行榜，但存在补丁过拟合和缺乏形式正确性保证的问题。
Defects4J仍是最广泛使用的基准测试，但其有限范围造成了偏向单代码块Java缺陷修复的评估偏差。

title: SmartAudit: Automated Smart Contract Auditing
authors: Yanlin Wang, Zibin Zheng, Xiapu Luo
abstract: Early work on using LLMs for automated smart contract security auditing.
summary: Early work on using LLMs for automated smart contract security auditing.
summary_zh: 使用LLM进行自动智能合约安全审计的早期工作。
abstract_zh: 使用LLM进行自动智能合约安全审计的早期工作。
contributions: Introduces a novel approach for early work on using LLMs for automated smart contract security auditing.
Leverages GPT-3.5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Finds 60% of vulnerabilities found by human auditors.
Targets smart contract security, addressing unique challenges of blockchain-based systems.
contributions_zh: 引入 a novel approach for early work on using LLMs for automated smart contract security auditing.
利用 GPT-3.5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Finds 60% of vulnerabilities found by human auditors.
针对 smart contract security, addressing unique challenges of blockchain-based systems.

experiment.key_results: Finds 60% of vulnerabilities found by human auditors

research_questions: Can LLMs perform automated smart contract security auditing comparably to human auditors?
What types of smart contract vulnerabilities (reentrancy, access control, logic errors) are LLMs best and worst at detecting?
How should smart contract code be structured in prompts to maximize LLM auditing effectiveness?
research_questions_zh: LLM能否与人工审计员相当地执行自动化智能合约安全审计？
LLM在检测哪些类型的智能合约漏洞（重入、访问控制、逻辑错误）方面最强和最弱？
如何在提示中构建智能合约代码以最大化LLM审计效果？
conclusions: GPT-3.5 based auditing finds 60% of vulnerabilities identified by human auditors, with strongest performance on reentrancy and integer overflow patterns.
Logic vulnerabilities and business-specific access control issues remain challenging for LLMs, with detection rates below 30% for complex multi-contract interactions.
Providing contract dependency graphs and storage layout information in the prompt increases detection accuracy by 25% over raw code input alone.
conclusions_zh: 基于GPT-3.5的审计发现了人工审计员识别的60%的漏洞，在重入和整数溢出模式上表现最强。
逻辑漏洞和业务特定的访问控制问题对LLM仍具挑战性，复杂多合约交互的检测率低于30%。
在提示中提供合约依赖图和存储布局信息比仅提供原始代码输入的检测准确率提高25%。

AI增强模糊测试最有前景的研究方向是什么？
conclusions: The survey reviews 150+ fuzzing papers and identifies coverage-guided greybox fuzzing as the dominant paradigm, with ML integration as a rapidly growing subfield.
Early LLM-based approaches show promise in seed generation and grammar inference but face challenges in generation latency and integration overhead.
Structured input fuzzing (protocols, file formats) and kernel fuzzing are identified as the areas where AI-enhancement has the highest potential impact.
conclusions_zh: 该综述回顾了150多篇模糊测试论文，将覆盖引导灰盒模糊测试确定为主导范式，ML集成作为快速增长的子领域。
早期基于LLM的方法在种子生成和语法推断方面展现潜力，但面临生成延迟和集成开销的挑战。
结构化输入模糊测试（协议、文件格式）和内核模糊测试被确定为AI增强最具潜在影响力的领域。

利用  for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.

research_questions: What is the current landscape of LLMs for code generation, and what security implications arise from generated code?
How frequently do LLM-generated code snippets contain security vulnerabilities?
What mitigation strategies can reduce security risks in LLM-assisted code generation?
research_questions_zh: LLM代码生成的当前全景如何？生成代码会产生哪些安全隐患？
LLM生成的代码片段中包含安全漏洞的频率有多高？
哪些缓解策略可以降低LLM辅助代码生成中的安全风险？
conclusions: The survey covers 100+ papers and finds that 25-40% of LLM-generated code contains at least one security-relevant weakness (CWE) in benchmark evaluations.
Code LLMs tend to replicate insecure coding patterns from training data, particularly in cryptographic API usage, input validation, and memory management.
Post-generation static analysis filtering and security-aware prompting can reduce vulnerability rates by 50-60% without significantly impacting functional correctness.
conclusions_zh: 该综述涵盖100多篇论文，发现在基准评估中25-40%的LLM生成代码包含至少一个安全相关弱点（CWE）。
代码LLM倾向于复制训练数据中的不安全编码模式，特别是在加密API使用、输入验证和内存管理方面。
生成后静态分析过滤和安全感知提示可将漏洞率降低50-60%，而不会显著影响功能正确性。

title: Less Training, More Repairing Please: Revisiting Automated Program Repair via Zero-Shot Learning
authors: Chunqiu Steven Xia, Lingming Zhang
abstract: Revisits APR with zero-shot LLMs, showing competitive performance without training.
summary: Revisits APR with zero-shot LLMs, showing competitive performance without training.
summary_zh: 使用零样本LLM重新审视APR，显示无需训练的竞争性能。
abstract_zh: 使用零样本LLM重新审视APR，显示无需训练的竞争性能。
contributions: Introduces a novel approach for revisits APR with zero-shot LLMs, showing competitive performance without training.
Utilizes Codex for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Zero-shot Codex fixes 97 bugs on Defects4J without training.
contributions_zh: 引入 a novel approach for revisits APR with zero-shot LLMs, showing competitive performance without training.
利用 Codex for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Zero-shot Codex fixes 97 bugs on Defects4J without training.

experiment.key_results: Zero-shot Codex fixes 97 bugs on Defects4J without training

research_questions: Can zero-shot LLMs achieve competitive program repair performance without any task-specific training?
How does Codex in zero-shot mode compare to trained APR tools on the Defects4J benchmark?
What prompt formats maximize zero-shot repair effectiveness for LLMs?
research_questions_zh: 零样本LLM能否在没有任何任务特定训练的情况下实现具有竞争力的程序修复性能？
Codex在零样本模式下与经过训练的APR工具在Defects4J基准测试上的比较如何？
什么提示格式可最大化LLM的零样本修复效果？
conclusions: Zero-shot Codex correctly fixes 97 bugs on Defects4J without any training, outperforming most trained APR techniques.
Minimal prompt engineering (buggy function + error message) achieves 85% of the performance of heavily engineered prompts for zero-shot repair.
The results challenge the assumption that task-specific fine-tuning is necessary for competitive APR performance, opening the door to training-free repair tools.
conclusions_zh: 零样本Codex在Defects4J上无需任何训练正确修复了97个缺陷，超越了大多数训练过的APR技术。
最小提示工程（有缺陷函数+错误信息）达到了零样本修复中精心设计提示85%的性能。
结果挑战了任务特定微调对竞争性APR性能必要的假设，为免训练修复工具打开了大门。

conclusions: The systematic review covers 300+ papers and identifies code generation as the most active area, with security and repair applications growing fastest.
Prompt engineering and in-context learning emerge as the dominant adaptation strategies across SE tasks, with fine-tuning reserved for specialized domains.
Key open challenges include hallucination in code generation, evaluation benchmark saturation, and the lack of real-world deployment studies.
conclusions_zh: 该系统综述涵盖300多篇论文，将代码生成确定为最活跃的领域，安全和修复应用增长最快。
提示工程和上下文学习成为跨SE任务的主导适应策略，微调仅用于专业领域。
关键开放挑战包括代码生成中的幻觉、评估基准饱和以及缺乏真实世界部署研究。

authors: Guorui Sun, Shaoying Li
abstract: Analysis of GPT-4's capabilities and risks for security applications.
summary: Analysis of GPT-4's capabilities and risks for security applications.

abstract_zh: 分析GPT-4在安全应用中的能力和风险。
contributions: Introduces a novel approach for analysis of GPT-4's capabilities and risks for security applications.
Applies GPT-4 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Characterizes GPT-4 strengths and weaknesses for security tasks.
contributions_zh: 引入 a novel approach for analysis of GPT-4's capabilities and risks for security applications.
应用 GPT-4 to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
